title: Modular Multi-Rotors: From Quadrotors to Fully-Actuated Aerial Vehicles
title_zh: 模块化多旋翼：从四旋翼飞行器到全驱动飞行器
comment: The linked supplementary materials can be accessed at: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/394219478_H-ModQuad_Supplementary_Materials
comments: The linked supplementary materials can be accessed at: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/394219478_H-ModQuad_Supplementary_Materials
abstract: Traditional aerial vehicles are constrained to perform specific tasks due to their adhoc designs. Based on modularity, we propose a versatile robot, H-ModQuad, that can adapt to different tasks by increasing its load capacity and actuated degrees of freedom. It is composed of cuboid modules propelled by quadrotors with tilted rotors. We present two families of module designs that bring scalable and versatile actuation to the aerial systems. By configuring multiple modules, H-ModQuad can increase its payload capacity and change its actuated degrees of freedom from 4 to 5 and 6. By modeling the actuation capability of H-ModQuad using actuation ellipsoids and wrench polytopes, we find the body frame of a vehicle that maximizes its thrusting efficiency. We also compare the vehicle capabilities against formally defined task requirements. We present the dynamics of H-ModQuad and integrate control strategies despite the vehicle design. The design and model are validated with experiments using actual robots, showing that H-ModQuad vehicles with different configurations provide different actuation properties.
summary: Traditional aerial vehicles are constrained to perform specific tasks due to their adhoc designs. Based on modularity, we propose a versatile robot, H-ModQuad, that can adapt to different tasks by increasing its load capacity and actuated degrees of freedom. It is composed of cuboid modules propelled by quadrotors with tilted rotors. We present two families of module designs that bring scalable and versatile actuation to the aerial systems. By configuring multiple modules, H-ModQuad can increase its payload capacity and change its actuated degrees of freedom from 4 to 5 and 6. By modeling the actuation capability of H-ModQuad using actuation ellipsoids and wrench polytopes, we find the body frame of a vehicle that maximizes its thrusting efficiency. We also compare the vehicle capabilities against formally defined task requirements. We present the dynamics of H-ModQuad and integrate control strategies despite the vehicle design. The design and model are validated with experiments using actual robots, showing that H-ModQuad vehicles with different configurations provide different actuation properties.
abstract_zh: 传统的飞行器由于其特殊的设计而只能执行特定的任务。基于模块化，我们提出了一种多功能机器人H-ModQuad，它可以通过增加负载能力和驱动自由度来适应不同的任务。它由长方体模块组成，由带有倾斜转子的四旋翼飞行器驱动。我们提供两个系列的模块设计，为航空系统带来可扩展和多功能的驱动。通过配置多个模块，H-ModQuad可以增加其有效载荷能力，并将其驱动自由度从4更改为5和6。通过使用驱动椭球体和扳手多面体对H-ModQuad的驱动能力进行建模，我们找到了最大化其推进效率的车辆车身框架。我们还将车辆功能与正式定义的任务要求进行比较。我们展示了 H-ModQuad 的动态并集成了车辆设计中的控制策略。该设计和模型通过实际机器人的实验进行了验证，表明具有不同配置的 H-ModQuad 车辆可提供不同的驱动特性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种模块化多旋翼飞行器H-ModQuad，能够通过增加负载能力和驱动自由度来适应不同的任务。
AI.motivation: 传统空中车辆由于设计的随意性而受到任务执行的限制，因此需要一种模块化设计以提高适应性和多功能性。
AI.method: 基于模块化设计理念，提出两种模块设计方案，通过配置多个模块实现负载能力和驱动自由度的扩展，并利用推力椭球和力矩多面体建模分析飞行器的驱动能力。
AI.result: 实验验证了H-ModQuad在不同配置下的驱动特性，展示了其在不同任务需求下的适应性和性能。
AI.conclusion: H-ModQuad模块化设计为多功能空中机器人提供了一种灵活且高效的解决方案，具有良好的应用前景。

authors_text: Timothy W. Hostetler,Shinyi Chen,Sergi Blanco-Cuaresma,Alberto Accomazzi,Michael J. Kurtz,Carolyn S. Grant,Edwin Henneken,Donna M. Thompson,Roman Chyla,Golnaz Shapurian,Matthew R. Templeton,Kelly E. Lockhart,Nemanja Martinovic,Stephen McDonald,Felix Grezes
title: Web accessibility trends and implementation in dynamic web applications
title_zh: 动态 Web 应用程序中的 Web 可访问性趋势和实现
abstract: The NASA Astrophysics Data System (ADS), a critical research service for the astrophysics community, strives to provide the most accessible and inclusive environment for the discovery and exploration of the astronomical literature. Part of this goal involves creating a digital platform that can accommodate everybody, including those with disabilities that would benefit from alternative ways to present the information provided by the website. NASA ADS follows the official Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) standard for ensuring accessibility of all its applications, striving to exceed this standard where possible. Through the use of both internal audits and external expert review based on these guidelines, we have identified many areas for improving accessibility in our current web application, and have implemented a number of updates to the UI as a result of this. We present an overview of some current web accessibility trends, discuss our experience incorporating these trends in our web application, and discuss the lessons learned and recommendations for future projects.
summary: The NASA Astrophysics Data System (ADS), a critical research service for the astrophysics community, strives to provide the most accessible and inclusive environment for the discovery and exploration of the astronomical literature. Part of this goal involves creating a digital platform that can accommodate everybody, including those with disabilities that would benefit from alternative ways to present the information provided by the website. NASA ADS follows the official Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) standard for ensuring accessibility of all its applications, striving to exceed this standard where possible. Through the use of both internal audits and external expert review based on these guidelines, we have identified many areas for improving accessibility in our current web application, and have implemented a number of updates to the UI as a result of this. We present an overview of some current web accessibility trends, discuss our experience incorporating these trends in our web application, and discuss the lessons learned and recommendations for future projects.
abstract_zh: NASA 天体物理数据系统 (ADS) 是天体物理学界的一项重要研究服务，致力于为天文学文献的发现和探索提供最方便和最具包容性的环境。这一目标的一部分涉及创建一个可以容纳所有人的数字平台，包括那些可以通过其他方式呈现网站提供的信息的残疾人。 NASA ADS 遵循官方 Web 内容可访问性指南 (WCAG) 标准，以确保其所有应用程序的可访问性，并尽可能超越该标准。通过根据这些准则使用内部审计和外部专家评审，我们确定了许多可以改进当前 Web 应用程序可访问性的领域，并因此对 UI 进行了许多更新。我们概述了当前的一些 Web 可访问性趋势，讨论了我们将这些趋势融入到 Web 应用程序中的经验，并讨论了经验教训和对未来项目的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了当前网络无障碍趋势，并探讨了在动态网络应用中实现这些趋势的实践经验。
AI.motivation: 为确保所有用户（包括残障人士）能够平等访问和使用NASA天体物理数据系统（ADS）的资源，需遵循并超越WCAG无障碍标准。
AI.method: 通过内部审核与外部专家评审结合WCAG标准，识别现有Web应用的无障碍改进点，并实施UI更新。
AI.result: 成功提升了NASA ADS平台的无障碍性，同时总结了无障碍趋势的实施经验与未来项目建议。
AI.conclusion: 动态Web应用需持续关注无障碍趋势，通过系统性审核与实践优化，为所有用户提供包容性体验。

title: Accelerating DNN Training with Structured Data Gradient Pruning
title_zh: 通过结构化数据梯度修剪加速 DNN 训练
abstract: Weight pruning is a technique to make Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference more computationally efficient by reducing the number of model parameters over the course of training. However, most weight pruning techniques generally does not speed up DNN training and can even require more iterations to reach model convergence. In this work, we propose a novel Structured Data Gradient Pruning (SDGP) method that can speed up training without impacting model convergence. This approach enforces a specific sparsity structure, where only N out of every M elements in a matrix can be nonzero, making it amenable to hardware acceleration. Modern accelerators such as the Nvidia A100 GPU support this type of structured sparsity for 2 nonzeros per 4 elements in a reduction. Assuming hardware support for 2:4 sparsity, our approach can achieve a 15-25\% reduction in total training time without significant impact to performance. Source code and pre-trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/BradMcDanel/sdgp}.
summary: Weight pruning is a technique to make Deep Neural Network (DNN) inference more computationally efficient by reducing the number of model parameters over the course of training. However, most weight pruning techniques generally does not speed up DNN training and can even require more iterations to reach model convergence. In this work, we propose a novel Structured Data Gradient Pruning (SDGP) method that can speed up training without impacting model convergence. This approach enforces a specific sparsity structure, where only N out of every M elements in a matrix can be nonzero, making it amenable to hardware acceleration. Modern accelerators such as the Nvidia A100 GPU support this type of structured sparsity for 2 nonzeros per 4 elements in a reduction. Assuming hardware support for 2:4 sparsity, our approach can achieve a 15-25\% reduction in total training time without significant impact to performance. Source code and pre-trained models are available at \url{https://github.com/BradMcDanel/sdgp}.
abstract_zh: 权重剪枝是一种通过在训练过程中减少模型参数的数量来提高深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理的计算效率的技术。然而，大多数权重修剪技术通常不会加速 DNN 训练，甚至可能需要更多迭代才能达到模型收敛。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的结构化数据梯度修剪（SDGP）方法，可以在不影响模型收敛的情况下加快训练速度。这种方法强制执行特定的稀疏结构，其中矩阵中的每 M 个元素中只有 N 个可以非零，从而使其适合硬件加速。现代加速器（例如 Nvidia A100 GPU）支持这种类型的结构化稀疏性，即每 4 个元素减少 2 个非零值。假设硬件支持 2:4 稀疏度，我们的方法可以将总训练时间减少 15-25%，而不会对性能产生重大影响。源代码和预训练模型可在 \url{https://github.com/BradMcDanel/sdgp} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为结构化数据梯度剪枝（SDGP）的新方法，用于加速深度神经网络（DNN）的训练过程。
AI.motivation: 现有的权重剪枝技术虽然可以提高推理效率，但通常不会加快训练速度，甚至可能增加达到模型收敛所需的迭代次数。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种结构化数据梯度剪枝方法，强制施加特定的稀疏结构，使得矩阵中每M个元素中只有N个非零，从而适用于硬件加速。
AI.result: 在假设硬件支持2:4稀疏性的前提下，该方法可将总训练时间减少15-25%，且对性能影响不大。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够在不显著影响性能的前提下，有效加速DNN训练过程。

title: PiP-X: Online feedback motion planning/replanning in dynamic environments using invariant funnels
title_zh: PiP-X：使用不变漏斗在动态环境中进行在线反馈运动规划/重新规划
comment: An abridged version of this paper appeared in the conference proceedings of the International Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR) 2022
comments: An abridged version of this paper appeared in the conference proceedings of the International Workshop on the Algorithmic Foundations of Robotics (WAFR) 2022
abstract: Computing kinodynamically feasible motion plans and repairing them on-the-fly as the environment changes is a challenging, yet relevant problem in robot-navigation. We propose a novel online single-query sampling-based motion re-planning algorithm - PiP-X, using finite-time invariant sets - funnels. We combine concepts from sampling-based methods, nonlinear systems analysis and control theory to create a single framework that enables feedback motion re-planning for any general nonlinear dynamical system in dynamic workspaces. A volumetric funnel-graph is constructed using sampling-based methods, and an optimal funnel-path from robot configuration to a desired goal region is then determined by computing the shortest-path subtree in it. Analysing and formally quantifying the stability of trajectories using Lyapunov level-set theory ensures kinodynamic feasibility and guaranteed set-invariance of the solution-paths. The use of incremental search techniques and a pre-computed library of motion-primitives ensure that our method can be used for quick online rewiring of controllable motion plans in densely cluttered and dynamic environments. We represent traversability and sequencibility of trajectories together in the form of an augmented directed-graph, helping us leverage discrete graph-based replanning algorithms to efficiently recompute feasible and controllable motion plans that are volumetric in nature. We validate our approach on a simulated 6DOF quadrotor platform in a variety of scenarios within a maze and random forest environment. From repeated experiments, we analyse the performance in terms of algorithm-success and length of traversed-trajectory.
summary: Computing kinodynamically feasible motion plans and repairing them on-the-fly as the environment changes is a challenging, yet relevant problem in robot-navigation. We propose a novel online single-query sampling-based motion re-planning algorithm - PiP-X, using finite-time invariant sets - funnels. We combine concepts from sampling-based methods, nonlinear systems analysis and control theory to create a single framework that enables feedback motion re-planning for any general nonlinear dynamical system in dynamic workspaces. A volumetric funnel-graph is constructed using sampling-based methods, and an optimal funnel-path from robot configuration to a desired goal region is then determined by computing the shortest-path subtree in it. Analysing and formally quantifying the stability of trajectories using Lyapunov level-set theory ensures kinodynamic feasibility and guaranteed set-invariance of the solution-paths. The use of incremental search techniques and a pre-computed library of motion-primitives ensure that our method can be used for quick online rewiring of controllable motion plans in densely cluttered and dynamic environments. We represent traversability and sequencibility of trajectories together in the form of an augmented directed-graph, helping us leverage discrete graph-based replanning algorithms to efficiently recompute feasible and controllable motion plans that are volumetric in nature. We validate our approach on a simulated 6DOF quadrotor platform in a variety of scenarios within a maze and random forest environment. From repeated experiments, we analyse the performance in terms of algorithm-success and length of traversed-trajectory.
abstract_zh: 计算运动动力学上可行的运动计划并在环境变化时即时修复它们是机器人导航中一个具有挑战性但又相关的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的在线单查询基于采样的运动重新规划算法 - PiP-X，使用有限时间不变集 - 漏斗。我们结合基于采样的方法、非线性系统分析和控制理论的概念来创建一个单一框架，该框架能够为动态工作空间中的任何通用非线性动力系统进行反馈运动重新规划。使用基于采样的方法构建体积漏斗图，然后通过计算其中的最短路径子树来确定从机器人配置到期望目标区域的最佳漏斗路径。使用李亚普诺夫水平集理论分析和形式量化轨迹的稳定性确保了运动动力学的可行性并保证了解路径的集合不变性。增量搜索技术和预先计算的运动基元库的使用确保我们的方法可以用于在密集杂乱和动态环境中快速在线重新布线可控运动计划。我们以增强有向图的形式一起表示轨迹的可遍历性和可排序性，帮助我们利用基于离散图的重新规划算法来有效地重新计算本质上是体积的可行且可控的运动计划。我们在迷宫和随机森林环境中的各种场景中在模拟 6DOF 四旋翼平台上验证了我们的方法。通过重复的实验，我们从算法成功和遍历轨迹的长度方面分析了性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不变流形的在线反馈运动规划/重规划算法PiP-X，用于动态环境中的机器人导航。
AI.motivation: 动态环境中机器人需要实时调整运动路径以应对环境变化，传统方法难以兼顾可行性与计算效率。
AI.method: 结合采样法、非线性系统分析与控制理论，构建基于不变流形的体积流形图，并通过Lyapunov理论确保轨迹稳定性，利用增量搜索与预计算运动原语实现快速重规划。
AI.result: 在模拟六自由度四旋翼飞行器的迷宫与随机森林环境中验证，算法在路径成功率和轨迹长度上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: PiP-X通过流形图与离散图重规划结合，实现了动态环境中高效、可行且稳定的运动规划与重规划。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不变流形的在线反馈运动规划/重规划算法PiP-X，用于动态环境中的机器人导航。
ai_content.motivation: 动态环境中机器人需要实时调整运动路径以应对环境变化，传统方法难以兼顾可行性与计算效率。
ai_content.method: 结合采样法、非线性系统分析与控制理论，构建基于不变流形的体积流形图，并通过Lyapunov理论确保轨迹稳定性，利用增量搜索与预计算运动原语实现快速重规划。
ai_content.result: 在模拟六自由度四旋翼飞行器的迷宫与随机森林环境中验证，算法在路径成功率和轨迹长度上表现优异。
ai_content.conclusion: PiP-X通过流形图与离散图重规划结合，实现了动态环境中高效、可行且稳定的运动规划与重规划。

search_text: PiP-X: Online feedback motion planning/replanning in dynamic environments using invariant funnels PiP-X：使用不变漏斗在动态环境中进行在线反馈运动规划/重新规划 Computing kinodynamically feasible motion plans and repairing them on-the-fly as the environment changes is a challenging, yet relevant problem in robot-navigation. We propose a novel online single-query sampling-based motion re-planning algorithm - PiP-X, using finite-time invariant sets - funnels. We combine concepts from sampling-based methods, nonlinear systems analysis and control theory to create a single framework that enables feedback motion re-planning for any general nonlinear dynamical system in dynamic workspaces. A volumetric funnel-graph is constructed using sampling-based methods, and an optimal funnel-path from robot configuration to a desired goal region is then determined by computing the shortest-path subtree in it. Analysing and formally quantifying the stability of trajectories using Lyapunov level-set theory ensures kinodynamic feasibility and guaranteed set-invariance of the solution-paths. The use of incremental search techniques and a pre-computed library of motion-primitives ensure that our method can be used for quick online rewiring of controllable motion plans in densely cluttered and dynamic environments. We represent traversability and sequencibility of trajectories together in the form of an augmented directed-graph, helping us leverage discrete graph-based replanning algorithms to efficiently recompute feasible and controllable motion plans that are volumetric in nature. We validate our approach on a simulated 6DOF quadrotor platform in a variety of scenarios within a maze and random forest environment. From repeated experiments, we analyse the performance in terms of algorithm-success and length of traversed-trajectory. 计算运动动力学上可行的运动计划并在环境变化时即时修复它们是机器人导航中一个具有挑战性但又相关的问题。我们提出了一种新颖的在线单查询基于采样的运动重新规划算法 - PiP-X，使用有限时间不变集 - 漏斗。我们结合基于采样的方法、非线性系统分析和控制理论的概念来创建一个单一框架，该框架能够为动态工作空间中的任何通用非线性动力系统进行反馈运动重新规划。使用基于采样的方法构建体积漏斗图，然后通过计算其中的最短路径子树来确定从机器人配置到期望目标区域的最佳漏斗路径。使用李亚普诺夫水平集理论分析和形式量化轨迹的稳定性确保了运动动力学的可行性并保证了解路径的集合不变性。增量搜索技术和预先计算的运动基元库的使用确保我们的方法可以用于在密集杂乱和动态环境中快速在线重新布线可控运动计划。我们以增强有向图的形式一起表示轨迹的可遍历性和可排序性，帮助我们利用基于离散图的重新规划算法来有效地重新计算本质上是体积的可行且可控的运动计划。我们在迷宫和随机森林环境中的各种场景中在模拟 6DOF 四旋翼平台上验证了我们的方法。通过重复的实验，我们从算法成功和遍历轨迹的长度方面分析了性能。 本文提出了一种基于不变流形的在线反馈运动规划/重规划算法PiP-X，用于动态环境中的机器人导航。 Mohamed Khalid M Jaffar,Michael Otte cs.RO

title: Local Feature Matching with Transformers for low-end devices
title_zh: 低端设备与 Transformer 的本地特征匹配
abstract: LoFTR arXiv:2104.00680 is an efficient deep learning method for finding appropriate local feature matches on image pairs. This paper reports on the optimization of this method to work on devices with low computational performance and limited memory. The original LoFTR approach is based on a ResNet arXiv:1512.03385 head and two modules based on Linear Transformer arXiv:2006.04768 architecture. In the presented work, only the coarse-matching block was left, the number of parameters was significantly reduced, and the network was trained using a knowledge distillation technique. The comparison showed that this approach allows to obtain an appropriate feature detection accuracy for the student model compared to the teacher model in the coarse matching block, despite the significant reduction of model size. Also, the paper shows additional steps required to make model compatible with NVIDIA TensorRT runtime, and shows an approach to optimize training method for low-end GPUs.
summary: LoFTR arXiv:2104.00680 is an efficient deep learning method for finding appropriate local feature matches on image pairs. This paper reports on the optimization of this method to work on devices with low computational performance and limited memory. The original LoFTR approach is based on a ResNet arXiv:1512.03385 head and two modules based on Linear Transformer arXiv:2006.04768 architecture. In the presented work, only the coarse-matching block was left, the number of parameters was significantly reduced, and the network was trained using a knowledge distillation technique. The comparison showed that this approach allows to obtain an appropriate feature detection accuracy for the student model compared to the teacher model in the coarse matching block, despite the significant reduction of model size. Also, the paper shows additional steps required to make model compatible with NVIDIA TensorRT runtime, and shows an approach to optimize training method for low-end GPUs.
abstract_zh: LoFTR arXiv:2104.00680 是一种有效的深度学习方法，用于在图像对上查找适当的局部特征匹配。本文报告了该方法的优化，使其适用于计算性能低且内存有限的设备。最初的 LoFTR 方法基于 ResNet arXiv:1512.03385 头和两个基于 Linear Transformer arXiv:2006.04768 架构的模块。在所提出的工作中，仅留下粗匹配块，参数数量显着减少，并使用知识蒸馏技术来训练网络。比较表明，尽管模型大小显着减小，但与粗匹配块中的教师模型相比，该方法允许学生模型获得适当的特征检测精度。此外，本文还展示了使模型与 NVIDIA TensorRT 运行时兼容所需的额外步骤，并展示了一种优化低端 GPU 训练方法的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化方法，将基于Transformer的局部特征匹配算法LoFTR适配到计算性能低、内存受限的设备上。
AI.motivation: 原始LoFTR模型基于ResNet和Linear Transformer架构，参数量大且计算复杂度高，难以在低端设备上部署。
AI.method: 通过仅保留粗匹配模块大幅减少参数，结合知识蒸馏训练学生模型，并优化模型以兼容NVIDIA TensorRT运行时及低端GPU训练方法。
AI.result: 学生模型在粗匹配任务中保持与教师模型相当的特征检测精度，模型尺寸显著缩小，成功适配TensorRT并优化了低端GPU训练效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型精度与计算资源需求，为低端设备部署视觉匹配任务提供了可行方案。

title: A Model for Multi-View Residual Covariances based on Perspective Deformation
title_zh: 基于透视变形的多视图残差协方差模型
abstract: In this work, we derive a model for the covariance of the visual residuals in multi-view SfM, odometry and SLAM setups. The core of our approach is the formulation of the residual covariances as a combination of geometric and photometric noise sources. And our key novel contribution is the derivation of a term modelling how local 2D patches suffer from perspective deformation when imaging 3D surfaces around a point. Together, these add up to an efficient and general formulation which not only improves the accuracy of both feature-based and direct methods, but can also be used to estimate more accurate measures of the state entropy and hence better founded point visibility thresholds. We validate our model with synthetic and real data and integrate it into photometric and feature-based Bundle Adjustment, improving their accuracy with a negligible overhead.
summary: In this work, we derive a model for the covariance of the visual residuals in multi-view SfM, odometry and SLAM setups. The core of our approach is the formulation of the residual covariances as a combination of geometric and photometric noise sources. And our key novel contribution is the derivation of a term modelling how local 2D patches suffer from perspective deformation when imaging 3D surfaces around a point. Together, these add up to an efficient and general formulation which not only improves the accuracy of both feature-based and direct methods, but can also be used to estimate more accurate measures of the state entropy and hence better founded point visibility thresholds. We validate our model with synthetic and real data and integrate it into photometric and feature-based Bundle Adjustment, improving their accuracy with a negligible overhead.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们推导出多视图 SfM、里程计和 SLAM 设置中视觉残差协方差的模型。我们方法的核心是将残差协方差公式化为几何和光度噪声源的组合。我们的关键新颖贡献是推导了一个术语，该术语模拟了在对点周围的 3D 表面进行成像时局部 2D 面片如何遭受透视变形。这些共同构成了一种有效且通用的公式，不仅提高了基于特征的方法和直接方法的准确性，而且还可以用于估计更准确的状态熵测量，从而更好地建立点可见性阈值。我们使用合成和真实数据验证我们的模型，并将其集成到光度和基于特征的捆绑调整中，以可忽略的开销提高其准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于透视变形的多视角残差协方差模型，用于改进视觉SLAM和SfM中的残差协方差估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未充分考虑透视变形对多视角残差协方差的影响，导致特征匹配和直接法的精度受限，需建立更精确的噪声模型。
AI.method: 将残差协方差分解为几何噪声与光度噪声的组合，并推导局部2D图像块因透视变形产生的协方差项，形成统一的数学表达式。
AI.result: 通过合成与真实数据验证，模型显著提升光度和特征Bundle Adjustment的精度，且计算开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为多视角重建提供了更准确的协方差估计框架，可有效提升状态熵估计与点可见性判定的可靠性。

authors_text: Yash Jain,Chi Ian Tang,Chulhong Min,Fahim Kawsar,Akhil Mathur
title: ColloSSL: Collaborative Self-Supervised Learning for Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: ColloSSL：用于人类活动识别的协作自监督学习
abstract: A major bottleneck in training robust Human-Activity Recognition models (HAR) is the need for large-scale labeled sensor datasets. Because labeling large amounts of sensor data is an expensive task, unsupervised and semi-supervised learning techniques have emerged that can learn good features from the data without requiring any labels. In this paper, we extend this line of research and present a novel technique called Collaborative Self-Supervised Learning (ColloSSL) which leverages unlabeled data collected from multiple devices worn by a user to learn high-quality features of the data. A key insight that underpins the design of ColloSSL is that unlabeled sensor datasets simultaneously captured by multiple devices can be viewed as natural transformations of each other, and leveraged to generate a supervisory signal for representation learning. We present three technical innovations to extend conventional self-supervised learning algorithms to a multi-device setting: a Device Selection approach which selects positive and negative devices to enable contrastive learning, a Contrastive Sampling algorithm which samples positive and negative examples in a multi-device setting, and a loss function called Multi-view Contrastive Loss which extends standard contrastive loss to a multi-device setting. Our experimental results on three multi-device datasets show that ColloSSL outperforms both fully-supervised and semi-supervised learning techniques in majority of the experiment settings, resulting in an absolute increase of upto 7.9% in F_1 score compared to the best performing baselines. We also show that ColloSSL outperforms the fully-supervised methods in a low-data regime, by just using one-tenth of the available labeled data in the best case.

Because labeling large amounts of sensor data is an expensive task, unsupervised and semi-supervised learning techniques have emerged that can learn good features from the data without requiring any labels. In this paper, we extend this line of research and present a novel technique called Collaborative Self-Supervised Learning (ColloSSL) which leverages unlabeled data collected from multiple devices worn by a user to learn high-quality features of the data. A key insight that underpins the design of ColloSSL is that unlabeled sensor datasets simultaneously captured by multiple devices can be viewed as natural transformations of each other, and leveraged to generate a supervisory signal for representation learning. We present three technical innovations to extend conventional self-supervised learning algorithms to a multi-device setting: a Device Selection approach which selects positive and negative devices to enable contrastive learning, a Contrastive Sampling algorithm which samples positive and negative examples in a multi-device setting, and a loss function called Multi-view Contrastive Loss which extends standard contrastive loss to a multi-device setting. Our experimental results on three multi-device datasets show that ColloSSL outperforms both fully-supervised and semi-supervised learning techniques in majority of the experiment settings, resulting in an absolute increase of upto 7.9% in F_1 score compared to the best performing baselines. We also show that ColloSSL outperforms the fully-supervised methods in a low-data regime, by just using one-tenth of the available labeled data in the best case.
abstract_zh: 训练强大的人类活动识别模型（HAR）的一个主要瓶颈是需要大规模标记的传感器数据集。由于标记大量传感器数据是一项昂贵的任务，因此出现了无监督和半监督学习技术，可以从数据中学习良好的特征，而不需要任何标签。在本文中，我们扩展了这一研究方向，并提出了一种称为协作自监督学习（ColloSSL）的新技术，该技术利用从用户佩戴的多个设备收集的未标记数据来学习数据的高质量特征。支持 ColloSSL 设计的一个关键见解是，由多个设备同时捕获的未标记传感器数据集可以被视为彼此的自然转换，并被用来生成用于表示学习的监督信号。我们提出了三项技术创新，将传统的自监督学习算法扩展到多设备设置：设备选择方法，选择正面和负面设备来实现对比学习；对比采样算法，在多设备设置中对正面和负面示例进行采样；以及称为多视图对比损失的损失函数，它将标准对比损失扩展到多设备设置。我们在三个多设备数据集上的实验结果表明，ColloSSL 在大多数实验设置中都优于全监督和半监督学习技术，与表现最佳的基线相比，F_1 分数绝对增加了 7.9%。我们还表明，ColloSSL 在低数据情况下优于完全监督的方法，在最佳情况下仅使用可用标记数据的十分之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ColloSSL的协作自监督学习方法，用于在多设备未标记传感器数据上训练高质量的人类活动识别模型。
AI.motivation: 训练鲁棒的人类活动识别模型需要大量标记的传感器数据，而数据标注成本高昂，因此需要利用未标记数据的自监督学习方法。
AI.method: 通过三个技术创新扩展传统自监督学习：设备选择策略、多设备对比抽样算法以及多视角对比损失函数，利用多设备数据间的自然变换生成监督信号。
AI.result: 在三个多设备数据集上，ColloSSL在多数实验设置中优于全监督和半监督方法，F1分数最高提升7.9%，且在低数据量下仅需1/10标注数据即可超越全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: ColloSSL通过多设备协作自监督学习有效提升了人类活动识别性能，尤其在标注数据稀缺时表现出显著优势。

title: Ranging-Based Localizability Optimization for Mobile Robotic Networks
title_zh: 移动机器人网络基于测距的定位性优化
abstract: In robotic networks relying on noisy range measurements between agents for cooperative localization, the achievable positioning accuracy strongly strongly depends on the network geometry. This motivates the problem of planning robot trajectories in such multi-robot systems in a way that maintains high localization accuracy. We present potential-based planning methods, where localizability potentials are introduced to characterize the quality of the network geometry for cooperative position estimation. These potentials are based on Cramer Rao Lower Bounds (CRLB) and provide a theoretical lower bound on the error covariance achievable by any unbiased position estimator. In the process, we establish connections between CRLBs and the theory of graph rigidity, which has been previously used to plan the motion of robotic networks. We develop decentralized deployment algorithms appropriate for large networks, and we use equality-constrained CRLBs to extend the concept of localizability to scenarios where additional information about the relative positions of the ranging sensors is known. We illustrate the resulting robot deployment methodology through simulated examples and an experiment.
summary: In robotic networks relying on noisy range measurements between agents for cooperative localization, the achievable positioning accuracy strongly strongly depends on the network geometry. This motivates the problem of planning robot trajectories in such multi-robot systems in a way that maintains high localization accuracy. We present potential-based planning methods, where localizability potentials are introduced to characterize the quality of the network geometry for cooperative position estimation. These potentials are based on Cramer Rao Lower Bounds (CRLB) and provide a theoretical lower bound on the error covariance achievable by any unbiased position estimator. In the process, we establish connections between CRLBs and the theory of graph rigidity, which has been previously used to plan the motion of robotic networks. We develop decentralized deployment algorithms appropriate for large networks, and we use equality-constrained CRLBs to extend the concept of localizability to scenarios where additional information about the relative positions of the ranging sensors is known. We illustrate the resulting robot deployment methodology through simulated examples and an experiment.
abstract_zh: 在依靠代理之间的噪声范围测量进行协作定位的机器人网络中，可实现的定位精度很大程度上取决于网络几何形状。这引发了在此类多机器人系统中以保持高定位精度的方式规划机器人轨迹的问题。我们提出了基于势的规划方法，其中引入可定位势来表征协作位置估计的网络几何质量。这些势基于 Cramer Rao 下界 (CRLB)，并提供任何无偏位置估计器可实现的误差协方差的理论下界。在此过程中，我们在 CRLB 和图刚性理论之间建立了联系，该理论之前已用于规划机器人网络的运动。我们开发了适用于大型网络的分散式部署算法，并使用等式约束的 CRLB 将可定位性的概念扩展到已知有关测距传感器相对位置的附加信息的场景。我们通过模拟示例和实验说明了由此产生的机器人部署方法。

AI.tldr: 提出基于势场的轨迹规划方法，优化移动机器人网络的定位性能
AI.motivation: 网络几何结构显著影响定位精度，需规划轨迹以维持高精度
AI.method: 基于CRLB和图刚性理论，设计势场规划方法，并开发分散式部署算法
AI.result: 通过模拟和实验验证了方法的有效性，提升了定位精度
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效优化了移动机器人网络的定位性能，适用于大规模场景

title: Lagrangian Manifold Monte Carlo on Monge Patches
title_zh: Monge 补丁上的拉格朗日流形蒙特卡罗
abstract: The efficiency of Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) depends on how the underlying geometry of the problem is taken into account. For distributions with strongly varying curvature, Riemannian metrics help in efficient exploration of the target distribution. Unfortunately, they have significant computational overhead due to e.g. repeated inversion of the metric tensor, and current geometric MCMC methods using the Fisher information matrix to induce the manifold are in practice slow. We propose a new alternative Riemannian metric for MCMC, by embedding the target distribution into a higher-dimensional Euclidean space as a Monge patch and using the induced metric determined by direct geometric reasoning. Our metric only requires first-order gradient information and has fast inverse and determinants, and allows reducing the computational complexity of individual iterations from cubic to quadratic in the problem dimensionality. We demonstrate how Lagrangian Monte Carlo in this metric efficiently explores the target distributions.
summary: The efficiency of Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) depends on how the underlying geometry of the problem is taken into account. For distributions with strongly varying curvature, Riemannian metrics help in efficient exploration of the target distribution. Unfortunately, they have significant computational overhead due to e.g. repeated inversion of the metric tensor, and current geometric MCMC methods using the Fisher information matrix to induce the manifold are in practice slow. We propose a new alternative Riemannian metric for MCMC, by embedding the target distribution into a higher-dimensional Euclidean space as a Monge patch and using the induced metric determined by direct geometric reasoning. Our metric only requires first-order gradient information and has fast inverse and determinants, and allows reducing the computational complexity of individual iterations from cubic to quadratic in the problem dimensionality. We demonstrate how Lagrangian Monte Carlo in this metric efficiently explores the target distributions.
abstract_zh: 马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 的效率取决于如何考虑问题的基础几何结构。对于曲率变化很大的分布，黎曼度量有助于有效探索目标分布。不幸的是，由于例如以下原因，它们具有大量的计算开销。度量张量的重复反演，以及当前使用 Fisher 信息矩阵来导出流形的几何 MCMC 方法实际上很慢。我们为 MCMC 提出了一种新的替代黎曼度量，通过将目标分布作为蒙日补丁嵌入到高维欧几里得空间中，并使用由直接几何推理确定的归纳度量。我们的度量仅需要一阶梯度信息，并且具有快速逆矩阵和行列式，并且允许降低问题维度中从三次到二次的各个迭代的计算复杂性。我们演示了该指标中的拉格朗日蒙特卡罗如何有效地探索目标分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Monge补丁的拉格朗日流形蒙特卡洛方法，通过改进黎曼度量提升MCMC采样效率。
AI.motivation: 传统几何MCMC方法因需反复计算度量张量逆矩阵导致计算开销大，难以高效处理高曲率分布问题。
AI.method: 将目标分布嵌入高维欧几里得空间形成Monge补丁，利用几何推导构造仅需一阶梯度信息的黎曼度量，将单次迭代复杂度从立方级降至二次级。
AI.result: 实验验证该度量在保持采样效率的同时显著降低计算成本，实现对目标分布的有效探索。
AI.conclusion: 通过几何嵌入与简化度量设计，提出的方法为高维复杂分布的MCMC采样提供了更高效的解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 实验验证该度量在保持采样效率的同时显著降低计算成本，实现对目标分布的有效探索。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过几何嵌入与简化度量设计，提出的方法为高维复杂分布的MCMC采样提供了更高效的解决方案。

search_text: Lagrangian Manifold Monte Carlo on Monge Patches Monge 补丁上的拉格朗日流形蒙特卡罗 The efficiency of Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) depends on how the underlying geometry of the problem is taken into account. For distributions with strongly varying curvature, Riemannian metrics help in efficient exploration of the target distribution. Unfortunately, they have significant computational overhead due to e.g. repeated inversion of the metric tensor, and current geometric MCMC methods using the Fisher information matrix to induce the manifold are in practice slow. We propose a new alternative Riemannian metric for MCMC, by embedding the target distribution into a higher-dimensional Euclidean space as a Monge patch and using the induced metric determined by direct geometric reasoning. Our metric only requires first-order gradient information and has fast inverse and determinants, and allows reducing the computational complexity of individual iterations from cubic to quadratic in the problem dimensionality. We demonstrate how Lagrangian Monte Carlo in this metric efficiently explores the target distributions. 马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 的效率取决于如何考虑问题的基础几何结构。对于曲率变化很大的分布，黎曼度量有助于有效探索目标分布。不幸的是，由于例如以下原因，它们具有大量的计算开销。度量张量的重复反演，以及当前使用 Fisher 信息矩阵来导出流形的几何 MCMC 方法实际上很慢。我们为 MCMC 提出了一种新的替代黎曼度量，通过将目标分布作为蒙日补丁嵌入到高维欧几里得空间中，并使用由直接几何推理确定的归纳度量。我们的度量仅需要一阶梯度信息，并且具有快速逆矩阵和行列式，并且允许降低问题维度中从三次到二次的各个迭代的计算复杂性。我们演示了该指标中的拉格朗日蒙特卡罗如何有效地探索目标分布。 本文提出一种基于Monge补丁的拉格朗日流形蒙特卡洛方法，通过改进黎曼度量提升MCMC采样效率。 Marcelo Hartmann,Mark Girolami,Arto Klami stat.ME,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ghazal Alinezhad Noghre,Armin Danesh Pazho,Justin Sanchez,Nathan Hewitt,Christopher Neff,Hamed Tabkhi
title: ADG-Pose: Automated Dataset Generation for Real-World Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: ADG-Pose：用于现实世界人体姿势估计的自动数据集生成
comment: The first two authors (G. Alinezhad Noghre and A. Danesh Pazho) have equal contribution. Conference: International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence
comments: The first two authors (G. Alinezhad Noghre and A. Danesh Pazho) have equal contribution. Conference: International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence
abstract: Recent advancements in computer vision have seen a rise in the prominence of applications using neural networks to understand human poses. However, while accuracy has been steadily increasing on State-of-the-Art datasets, these datasets often do not address the challenges seen in real-world applications. These challenges are dealing with people distant from the camera, people in crowds, and heavily occluded people. As a result, many real-world applications have trained on data that does not reflect the data present in deployment, leading to significant underperformance. This article presents ADG-Pose, a method for automatically generating datasets for real-world human pose estimation. These datasets can be customized to determine person distances, crowdedness, and occlusion distributions. Models trained with our method are able to perform in the presence of these challenges where those trained on other datasets fail. Using ADG-Pose, end-to-end accuracy for real-world skeleton-based action recognition sees a 20% increase on scenes with moderate distance and occlusion levels, and a 4X increase on distant scenes where other models failed to perform better than random.

abstract_zh: 计算机视觉的最新进展使得使用神经网络来理解人体姿势的应用程序越来越突出。然而，虽然最先进的数据集的准确性一直在稳步提高，但这些数据集通常无法解决现实应用中遇到的挑战。这些挑战是处理远离摄像机的人、人群中的人以及严重遮挡的人。因此，许多现实世界的应用程序所训练的数据并不反映部署中存在的数据，从而导致性能严重不佳。本文介绍了 ADG-Pose，一种自动生成用于现实世界人体姿势估计的数据集的方法。可以定制这些数据集来确定人员距离、拥挤度和遮挡分布。使用我们的方法训练的模型能够在面临这些挑战时执行，而在其他数据集上训练的模型则失败。使用 ADG-Pose，现实世界中基于骨架的动作识别的端到端准确度在中等距离和遮挡级别的场景中提高了 20%，在其他模型无法比随机模型表现更好的远处场景中提高了 4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ADG-Pose方法，用于自动生成适应真实场景的人体姿态估计数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集无法有效应对真实场景中人体距离远、人群密集和遮挡等挑战，导致模型部署时性能显著下降。
AI.method: 通过自动化生成可定制距离、拥挤度和遮挡分布的数据集，增强模型对复杂场景的适应能力。
AI.result: 在中等距离和遮挡场景下，动作识别准确率提升20%；在远距离场景下，准确率较随机猜测提升4倍。
AI.conclusion: ADG-Pose通过生成符合真实场景的数据，显著提升了人体姿态估计模型在复杂环境中的表现。

title: Towards Positive Jacobian: Learn to Postprocess Diffeomorphic Image Registration with Matrix Exponential
title_zh: 迈向正雅可比行列式：学习使用矩阵指数对微分同胚图像配准进行后处理
abstract: We present a postprocessing layer for deformable image registration to make a registration field more diffeomorphic by encouraging Jacobians of the transformation to be positive. Diffeomorphic image registration is important for medical imaging studies because of the properties like invertibility, smoothness of the transformation, and topology preservation/non-folding of the grid. Violation of these properties can lead to destruction of the neighbourhood and the connectivity of anatomical structures during image registration. Most of the recent deep learning methods do not explicitly address this folding problem and try to solve it with a smoothness regularization on the registration field. In this paper, we propose a differentiable layer, which takes any registration field as its input, computes exponential of the Jacobian matrices of the input and reconstructs a new registration field from the exponentiated Jacobian matrices using Poisson reconstruction. Our proposed Poisson reconstruction loss enforces positive Jacobians for the final registration field. Thus, our method acts as a post-processing layer without any learnable parameters of its own and can be placed at the end of any deep learning pipeline to form an end-to-end learnable framework. We show the effectiveness of our proposed method for a popular deep learning registration method Voxelmorph and evaluate it with a dataset containing 3D brain MRI scans. Our results show that our post-processing can effectively decrease the number of non-positive Jacobians by a significant amount without any noticeable deterioration of the registration accuracy, thus making the registration field more diffeomorphic. Our code is available online at https://github.com/Soumyadeep-Pal/Diffeomorphic-Image-Registration-Postprocess.
summary: We present a postprocessing layer for deformable image registration to make a registration field more diffeomorphic by encouraging Jacobians of the transformation to be positive. Diffeomorphic image registration is important for medical imaging studies because of the properties like invertibility, smoothness of the transformation, and topology preservation/non-folding of the grid. Violation of these properties can lead to destruction of the neighbourhood and the connectivity of anatomical structures during image registration. Most of the recent deep learning methods do not explicitly address this folding problem and try to solve it with a smoothness regularization on the registration field. In this paper, we propose a differentiable layer, which takes any registration field as its input, computes exponential of the Jacobian matrices of the input and reconstructs a new registration field from the exponentiated Jacobian matrices using Poisson reconstruction. Our proposed Poisson reconstruction loss enforces positive Jacobians for the final registration field. Thus, our method acts as a post-processing layer without any learnable parameters of its own and can be placed at the end of any deep learning pipeline to form an end-to-end learnable framework. We show the effectiveness of our proposed method for a popular deep learning registration method Voxelmorph and evaluate it with a dataset containing 3D brain MRI scans. Our results show that our post-processing can effectively decrease the number of non-positive Jacobians by a significant amount without any noticeable deterioration of the registration accuracy, thus making the registration field more diffeomorphic. Our code is available online at https://github.com/Soumyadeep-Pal/Diffeomorphic-Image-Registration-Postprocess.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于可变形图像配准的后处理层，通过鼓励变换的雅可比行列式为正，使配准场更加微分同胚。微分同胚图像配准对于医学成像研究非常重要，因为它具有可逆性、变换平滑性以及网格的拓扑保存/非折叠等特性。违反这些属性可能会导致图像配准过程中邻域和解剖结构连接性的破坏。最近的大多数深度学习方法都没有明确解决这个折叠问题，而是尝试通过配准域上的平滑正则化来解决它。在本文中，我们提出了一个可微层，它将任何配准域作为输入，计算输入的雅可比矩阵的指数，并使用泊松重建从指数雅可比矩阵重建一个新的配准域。我们提出的泊松重建损失对最终配准字段强制执行正雅可比行列式。因此，我们的方法充当后处理层，没有任何自己的可学习参数，并且可以放置在任何深度学习管道的末端，以形成端到端的可学习框架。我们展示了我们提出的方法对于流行的深度学习配准方法 Voxelmorph 的有效性，并使用包含 3D 脑部 MRI 扫描的数据集对其进行了评估。我们的结果表明，我们的后处理可以有效地显着减少非正雅可比行列式的数量，而配准精度没有任何明显的恶化，从而使配准场更加微分同胚。我们的代码可在线获取：https://github.com/Soumyadeep-Pal/Diffeomorphic-Image-Registration-Postprocess。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种后处理层，通过鼓励变换雅可比矩阵为正，使可变形图像配准更符合微分同胚特性。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法未显式解决配准过程中的折叠问题，可能导致解剖结构连接性破坏，需通过显式保证雅可比正性来提升配准可靠性。
AI.method: 设计一个无参数可学习的微分层，对输入配准场计算雅可比矩阵指数，利用泊松重建生成新配准场，并通过泊松重建损失强制最终雅可比矩阵为正。
AI.result: 在Voxelmorph框架和3D脑MRI数据集上验证，显著减少非正雅可比数量，且未明显损害配准精度。
AI.conclusion: 该后处理层可有效提升配准场的微分同胚性，为现有深度学习配准框架提供通用改进方案。

We show the effectiveness of our proposed method for a popular deep learning registration method Voxelmorph and evaluate it with a dataset containing 3D brain MRI scans. Our results show that our post-processing can effectively decrease the number of non-positive Jacobians by a significant amount without any noticeable deterioration of the registration accuracy, thus making the registration field more diffeomorphic. Our code is available online at https://github.com/Soumyadeep-Pal/Diffeomorphic-Image-Registration-Postprocess. 我们提出了一个用于可变形图像配准的后处理层，通过鼓励变换的雅可比行列式为正，使配准场更加微分同胚。微分同胚图像配准对于医学成像研究非常重要，因为它具有可逆性、变换平滑性以及网格的拓扑保存/非折叠等特性。违反这些属性可能会导致图像配准过程中邻域和解剖结构连接性的破坏。最近的大多数深度学习方法都没有明确解决这个折叠问题，而是尝试通过配准域上的平滑正则化来解决它。在本文中，我们提出了一个可微层，它将任何配准域作为输入，计算输入的雅可比矩阵的指数，并使用泊松重建从指数雅可比矩阵重建一个新的配准域。我们提出的泊松重建损失对最终配准字段强制执行正雅可比行列式。因此，我们的方法充当后处理层，没有任何自己的可学习参数，并且可以放置在任何深度学习管道的末端，以形成端到端的可学习框架。我们展示了我们提出的方法对于流行的深度学习配准方法 Voxelmorph 的有效性，并使用包含 3D 脑部 MRI 扫描的数据集对其进行了评估。我们的结果表明，我们的后处理可以有效地显着减少非正雅可比行列式的数量，而配准精度没有任何明显的恶化，从而使配准场更加微分同胚。我们的代码可在线获取：https://github.com/Soumyadeep-Pal/Diffeomorphic-Image-Registration-Postprocess。 本文提出一种后处理层，通过鼓励变换雅可比矩阵为正，使可变形图像配准更符合微分同胚特性。 Soumyadeep Pal,Matthew Tennant,Nilanjan Ray eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Mohamed Elminshawi,Wolfgang Mack,Srikanth Raj Chetupalli,Soumitro Chakrabarty,Emanuël A. P. Habets
title: New Insights on Target Speaker Extraction
title_zh: 目标说话人提取的新见解
abstract: Speaker extraction (SE) aims to segregate the speech of a target speaker from a mixture of interfering speakers with the help of auxiliary information. Several forms of auxiliary information have been employed in single-channel SE, such as a speech snippet enrolled from the target speaker or visual information corresponding to the spoken utterance. The effectiveness of the auxiliary information in SE is typically evaluated by comparing the extraction performance of SE with uninformed speaker separation (SS) methods. Following this evaluation protocol, many SE studies have reported performance improvement compared to SS, attributing this to the auxiliary information. However, such studies have been conducted on a few datasets and have not considered recent deep neural network architectures for SS that have shown impressive separation performance. In this paper, we examine the role of the auxiliary information in SE for different input scenarios and over multiple datasets. Specifically, we compare the performance of two SE systems (audio-based and video-based) with SS using a common framework that utilizes the recently proposed dual-path recurrent neural network as the main learning machine. Experimental evaluation on various datasets demonstrates that the use of auxiliary information in the considered SE systems does not always lead to better extraction performance compared to the uninformed SS system. Furthermore, we offer insights into the behavior of the SE systems when provided with different and distorted auxiliary information given the same mixture input.
summary: Speaker extraction (SE) aims to segregate the speech of a target speaker from a mixture of interfering speakers with the help of auxiliary information. Several forms of auxiliary information have been employed in single-channel SE, such as a speech snippet enrolled from the target speaker or visual information corresponding to the spoken utterance. The effectiveness of the auxiliary information in SE is typically evaluated by comparing the extraction performance of SE with uninformed speaker separation (SS) methods. Following this evaluation protocol, many SE studies have reported performance improvement compared to SS, attributing this to the auxiliary information. However, such studies have been conducted on a few datasets and have not considered recent deep neural network architectures for SS that have shown impressive separation performance. In this paper, we examine the role of the auxiliary information in SE for different input scenarios and over multiple datasets. Specifically, we compare the performance of two SE systems (audio-based and video-based) with SS using a common framework that utilizes the recently proposed dual-path recurrent neural network as the main learning machine. Experimental evaluation on various datasets demonstrates that the use of auxiliary information in the considered SE systems does not always lead to better extraction performance compared to the uninformed SS system. Furthermore, we offer insights into the behavior of the SE systems when provided with different and distorted auxiliary information given the same mixture input.
abstract_zh: 说话人提取（SE）旨在借助辅助信息将目标说话人的语音从干扰说话人的混合物中分离出来。单通道SE中已经采用了多种形式的辅助信息，例如从目标说话者登记的语音片段或与口语相对应的视觉信息。 SE 中辅助信息的有效性通常通过比较 SE 与无信息说话人分离（SS）方法的提取性能来评估。遵循此评估协议，许多 SE 研究报告了与 SS 相比的性能改进，并将其归因于辅助信息。然而，此类研究是在一些数据集上进行的，并且没有考虑最近显示出令人印象深刻的分离性能的 SS 深度神经网络架构。在本文中，我们研究了辅助信息在 SE 中对于不同输入场景和多个数据集的作用。具体来说，我们使用一个通用框架来比较两个 SE 系统（基于音频和基于视频）与 SS 的性能，该框架利用最近提出的双路径循环神经网络作为主要学习机。对各种数据集的实验评估表明，与不知情的 SS 系统相比，在所考虑的 SE 系统中使用辅助信息并不总是能带来更好的提取性能。此外，我们还深入了解了 SE 系统在给定相同混合输入的情况下提供不同且扭曲的辅助信息时的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了辅助信息在不同输入场景和多个数据集下的目标说话人提取（SE）中的作用，并与无辅助信息的说话人分离（SS）方法进行比较。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多基于少量数据集且未考虑最新深度神经网络架构，导致辅助信息有效性评估存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用统一框架，利用双路径循环神经网络比较音频和视频辅助信息的SE系统与SS方法的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，辅助信息在部分场景下未能显著提升SE性能，且系统对辅助信息的鲁棒性存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 辅助信息的有效性依赖于输入场景和数据特性，需重新评估其在现代深度学习架构中的必要性。

authors_text: Ankit Goyal,Arsalan Mousavian,Chris Paxton,Yu-Wei Chao,Brian Okorn,Jia Deng,Dieter Fox
title: IFOR: Iterative Flow Minimization for Robotic Object Rearrangement
title_zh: IFOR：机器人对象重排的迭代流最小化
abstract: Accurate object rearrangement from vision is a crucial problem for a wide variety of real-world robotics applications in unstructured environments. We propose IFOR, Iterative Flow Minimization for Robotic Object Rearrangement, an end-to-end method for the challenging problem of object rearrangement for unknown objects given an RGBD image of the original and final scenes. First, we learn an optical flow model based on RAFT to estimate the relative transformation of the objects purely from synthetic data. This flow is then used in an iterative minimization algorithm to achieve accurate positioning of previously unseen objects. Crucially, we show that our method applies to cluttered scenes, and in the real world, while training only on synthetic data. Videos are available at https://imankgoyal.github.io/ifor.html.
summary: Accurate object rearrangement from vision is a crucial problem for a wide variety of real-world robotics applications in unstructured environments. We propose IFOR, Iterative Flow Minimization for Robotic Object Rearrangement, an end-to-end method for the challenging problem of object rearrangement for unknown objects given an RGBD image of the original and final scenes. First, we learn an optical flow model based on RAFT to estimate the relative transformation of the objects purely from synthetic data. This flow is then used in an iterative minimization algorithm to achieve accurate positioning of previously unseen objects. Crucially, we show that our method applies to cluttered scenes, and in the real world, while training only on synthetic data. Videos are available at https://imankgoyal.github.io/ifor.html.
abstract_zh: 对于非结构化环境中的各种现实机器人应用来说，通过视觉准确地重新排列物体是一个关键问题。我们提出了 IFOR（机器人对象重排的迭代流最小化），这是一种端到端方法，用于解决给定原始场景和最终场景的 RGBD 图像的未知对象的对象重排这一挑战性问题。首先，我们学习基于 RAFT 的光流模型，纯粹根据合成数据来估计对象的相对变换。然后，该流程用于迭代最小化算法，以实现对以前未见过的对象的准确定位。至关重要的是，我们表明我们的方法适用于杂乱的场景和现实世界，同时仅对合成数据进行训练。视频可在 https://imankgoyal.github.io/ifor.html 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IFOR方法，通过迭代光流最小化实现机器人对未知物体的精确重排，仅依赖RGBD图像进行端到端学习。
AI.motivation: 在无结构环境中，机器人需要处理未知物体的精确重排，但现有方法难以应对复杂场景和未知目标。
AI.method: 基于RAFT学习光流模型估计物体变换，结合迭代最小化算法优化未知物体定位，仅使用合成数据训练。
AI.result: 方法在杂乱场景和真实世界中有效，无需额外训练数据，视频演示验证了其可行性。
AI.conclusion: IFOR展示了从合成数据到现实应用的潜力，为复杂环境下的机器人重排提供了新思路。

authors_text: Francesco Nardo,Davide Peressoni,Paolo Testolina,Marco Giordani,Andrea Zanella
title: Point Cloud Compression for Efficient Data Broadcasting: A Performance Comparison
title_zh: 用于高效数据广播的点云压缩：性能比较
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. This paper has been accepted for presentation at IEEE Wireless Communications and Networking Conference (WCNC) 2022. Please cite it as: F. Nardo, D. Peressoni, P. Testolina, M. Giordani, and A. Zanella, "Point cloud compression for efficient data broadcasting: A performance comparison," IEEE Wireless Communications and Networking Conference (WCNC), Austin, USA, 2022
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. This paper has been accepted for presentation at IEEE Wireless Communications and Networking Conference (WCNC) 2022. Please cite it as: F. Nardo, D. Peressoni, P. Testolina, M. Giordani, and A. Zanella, "Point cloud compression for efficient data broadcasting: A performance comparison," IEEE Wireless Communications and Networking Conference (WCNC), Austin, USA, 2022
abstract: The worldwide commercialization of fifth generation (5G) wireless networks and the exciting possibilities offered by connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) are pushing toward the deployment of heterogeneous sensors for tracking dynamic objects in the automotive environment. Among them, Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) sensors are witnessing a surge in popularity as their application to vehicular networks seem particularly promising. LiDARs can indeed produce a three-dimensional (3D) mapping of the surrounding environment, which can be used for object detection, recognition, and topography. These data are encoded as a point cloud which, when transmitted, may pose significant challenges to the communication systems as it can easily congest the wireless channel. Along these lines, this paper investigates how to compress point clouds in a fast and efficient way. Both 2D- and a 3D-oriented approaches are considered, and the performance of the corresponding techniques is analyzed in terms of (de)compression time, efficiency, and quality of the decompressed frame compared to the original. We demonstrate that, thanks to the matrix form in which LiDAR frames are saved, compression methods that are typically applied for 2D images give equivalent results, if not better, than those specifically designed for 3D point clouds.
summary: The worldwide commercialization of fifth generation (5G) wireless networks and the exciting possibilities offered by connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) are pushing toward the deployment of heterogeneous sensors for tracking dynamic objects in the automotive environment. Among them, Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) sensors are witnessing a surge in popularity as their application to vehicular networks seem particularly promising. LiDARs can indeed produce a three-dimensional (3D) mapping of the surrounding environment, which can be used for object detection, recognition, and topography. These data are encoded as a point cloud which, when transmitted, may pose significant challenges to the communication systems as it can easily congest the wireless channel. Along these lines, this paper investigates how to compress point clouds in a fast and efficient way. Both 2D- and a 3D-oriented approaches are considered, and the performance of the corresponding techniques is analyzed in terms of (de)compression time, efficiency, and quality of the decompressed frame compared to the original. We demonstrate that, thanks to the matrix form in which LiDAR frames are saved, compression methods that are typically applied for 2D images give equivalent results, if not better, than those specifically designed for 3D point clouds.
abstract_zh: 第五代 (5G) 无线网络的全球商业化以及互联自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 提供的令人兴奋的可能性正在推动异构传感器的部署，以跟踪汽车环境中的动态物体。其中，光探测和测距（LiDAR）传感器的受欢迎程度激增，因为它们在车辆网络中的应用似乎特别有前景。 LiDAR 确实可以生成周围环境的三维 (3D) 地图，可用于物体检测、识别和地形测量。这些数据被编码为点云，在传输时可能会给通信系统带来重大挑战，因为它很容易堵塞无线通道。沿着这些思路，本文研究了如何快速有效地压缩点云。考虑了面向 2D 和 3D 的方法，并根据解压缩帧与原始帧相比的压缩（解）压缩时间、效率和质量来分析相应技术的性能。我们证明，由于保存 LiDAR 帧的矩阵形式，通常应用于 2D 图像的压缩方法可以提供与专门为 3D 点云设计的压缩方法相同的结果，甚至更好。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了2D和3D点云压缩方法在自动驾驶环境中的性能，以提高数据广播效率。
AI.motivation: 5G网络和自动驾驶车辆的普及导致LiDAR点云数据传输需求激增，传统传输方式易造成无线信道拥堵，需高效压缩技术。
AI.method: 基于LiDAR帧的矩阵形式，对比分析2D图像压缩算法与专用3D点云压缩技术的压缩时间、效率及重建质量。
AI.result: 实验表明，2D压缩方法在时间效率和重建质量上可与甚至优于3D专用方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用矩阵形式的2D压缩技术可有效替代复杂3D方法，在保证质量的同时提升点云数据传输效率。

search_text: Point Cloud Compression for Efficient Data Broadcasting: A Performance Comparison 用于高效数据广播的点云压缩：性能比较 The worldwide commercialization of fifth generation (5G) wireless networks and the exciting possibilities offered by connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) are pushing toward the deployment of heterogeneous sensors for tracking dynamic objects in the automotive environment. Among them, Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) sensors are witnessing a surge in popularity as their application to vehicular networks seem particularly promising. LiDARs can indeed produce a three-dimensional (3D) mapping of the surrounding environment, which can be used for object detection, recognition, and topography. These data are encoded as a point cloud which, when transmitted, may pose significant challenges to the communication systems as it can easily congest the wireless channel. Along these lines, this paper investigates how to compress point clouds in a fast and efficient way. Both 2D- and a 3D-oriented approaches are considered, and the performance of the corresponding techniques is analyzed in terms of (de)compression time, efficiency, and quality of the decompressed frame compared to the original. We demonstrate that, thanks to the matrix form in which LiDAR frames are saved, compression methods that are typically applied for 2D images give equivalent results, if not better, than those specifically designed for 3D point clouds. 第五代 (5G) 无线网络的全球商业化以及互联自动驾驶汽车 (CAV) 提供的令人兴奋的可能性正在推动异构传感器的部署，以跟踪汽车环境中的动态物体。其中，光探测和测距（LiDAR）传感器的受欢迎程度激增，因为它们在车辆网络中的应用似乎特别有前景。 LiDAR 确实可以生成周围环境的三维 (3D) 地图，可用于物体检测、识别和地形测量。这些数据被编码为点云，在传输时可能会给通信系统带来重大挑战，因为它很容易堵塞无线通道。沿着这些思路，本文研究了如何快速有效地压缩点云。考虑了面向 2D 和 3D 的方法，并根据解压缩帧与原始帧相比的压缩（解）压缩时间、效率和质量来分析相应技术的性能。我们证明，由于保存 LiDAR 帧的矩阵形式，通常应用于 2D 图像的压缩方法可以提供与专门为 3D 点云设计的压缩方法相同的结果，甚至更好。 本文比较了2D和3D点云压缩方法在自动驾驶环境中的性能，以提高数据广播效率。 Francesco Nardo,Davide Peressoni,Paolo Testolina,Marco Giordani,Andrea Zanella eess.IV,cs.NI

authors_text: Kunyu Peng,Alina Roitberg,Kailun Yang,Jiaming Zhang,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: Should I take a walk? Estimating Energy Expenditure from Video Data
title_zh: 我应该去散步吗？根据视频数据估算能源消耗
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022 CVPM Workshop. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/KPeng9510/Vid2Burn
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022 CVPM Workshop. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/KPeng9510/Vid2Burn
abstract: We explore the problem of automatically inferring the amount of kilocalories used by human during physical activity from his/her video observation. To study this underresearched task, we introduce Vid2Burn -- an omni-source benchmark for estimating caloric expenditure from video data featuring both, high- and low-intensity activities for which we derive energy expenditure annotations based on models established in medical literature. In practice, a training set would only cover a certain amount of activity types, and it is important to validate, if the model indeed captures the essence of energy expenditure, (e.g., how many and which muscles are involved and how intense they work) instead of memorizing fixed values of specific activity categories seen during training. Ideally, the models should look beyond such category-specific biases and regress the caloric cost in videos depicting activity categories not explicitly present during training. With this property in mind, Vid2Burn is accompanied with a cross-category benchmark, where the task is to regress caloric expenditure for types of physical activities not present during training. An extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art approaches for video recognition modified for the energy expenditure estimation task demonstrates the difficulty of this problem, especially for new activity types at test-time, marking a new research direction. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/KPeng9510/Vid2Burn.
summary: We explore the problem of automatically inferring the amount of kilocalories used by human during physical activity from his/her video observation. To study this underresearched task, we introduce Vid2Burn -- an omni-source benchmark for estimating caloric expenditure from video data featuring both, high- and low-intensity activities for which we derive energy expenditure annotations based on models established in medical literature. In practice, a training set would only cover a certain amount of activity types, and it is important to validate, if the model indeed captures the essence of energy expenditure, (e.g., how many and which muscles are involved and how intense they work) instead of memorizing fixed values of specific activity categories seen during training. Ideally, the models should look beyond such category-specific biases and regress the caloric cost in videos depicting activity categories not explicitly present during training. With this property in mind, Vid2Burn is accompanied with a cross-category benchmark, where the task is to regress caloric expenditure for types of physical activities not present during training. An extensive evaluation of state-of-the-art approaches for video recognition modified for the energy expenditure estimation task demonstrates the difficulty of this problem, especially for new activity types at test-time, marking a new research direction. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/KPeng9510/Vid2Burn.
abstract_zh: 我们探索从视频观察中自动推断人类在体育活动期间使用的千卡量的问题。为了研究这项研究不足的任务，我们引入了 Vid2Burn——一种全源基准，用于根据视频数据估算热量消耗，包括高强度和低强度活动，我们根据医学文献中建立的模型得出能量消耗注释。在实践中，训练集只会涵盖一定数量的活动类型，并且重要的是要验证模型是否确实捕获了能量消耗的本质（例如，涉及多少块肌肉、哪些肌肉以及它们的工作强度），而不是记住训练期间看到的特定活动类别的固定值。理想情况下，模型应该超越这种特定于类别的偏差，并回归描述训练期间未明确存在的活动类别的视频中的热量成本。考虑到这一特性，Vid2Burn 附带了一个跨类别基准，其任务是回归训练期间不存在的体育活动类型的热量消耗。对针对能量消耗估计任务修改的最先进的视频识别方法的广泛评估表明了该问题的难度，特别是对于测试时的新活动类型，这标志着一个新的研究方向。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/KPeng9510/Vid2Burn 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Vid2Burn基准数据集，用于从视频中自动估计人类体力活动的能量消耗（卡路里）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对视频数据中能量消耗的系统性研究，需验证模型是否理解运动本质而非记忆特定活动类别。
AI.method: 构建包含高低强度活动的视频数据集，通过医学模型标注能量消耗，并设计跨类别测试验证模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 主流视频识别方法在未见活动类型上表现不佳，凸显该任务的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 能量消耗估计需新研究方向，模型应超越类别偏见以实现跨活动类型的泛化。

authors_text: Amir Ardalan Kalantari,Mohammad Amini,Sarath Chandar,Doina Precup
title: Improving Sample Efficiency of Value Based Models Using Attention and Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用注意力和视觉变压器提高基于价值的模型的样本效率
abstract: Much of recent Deep Reinforcement Learning success is owed to the neural architecture's potential to learn and use effective internal representations of the world. While many current algorithms access a simulator to train with a large amount of data, in realistic settings, including while playing games that may be played against people, collecting experience can be quite costly. In this paper, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning architecture whose purpose is to increase sample efficiency without sacrificing performance. We design this architecture by incorporating advances achieved in recent years in the field of Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision. Specifically, we propose a visually attentive model that uses transformers to learn a self-attention mechanism on the feature maps of the state representation, while simultaneously optimizing return. We demonstrate empirically that this architecture improves sample complexity for several Atari environments, while also achieving better performance in some of the games.
summary: Much of recent Deep Reinforcement Learning success is owed to the neural architecture's potential to learn and use effective internal representations of the world. While many current algorithms access a simulator to train with a large amount of data, in realistic settings, including while playing games that may be played against people, collecting experience can be quite costly. In this paper, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning architecture whose purpose is to increase sample efficiency without sacrificing performance. We design this architecture by incorporating advances achieved in recent years in the field of Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision. Specifically, we propose a visually attentive model that uses transformers to learn a self-attention mechanism on the feature maps of the state representation, while simultaneously optimizing return. We demonstrate empirically that this architecture improves sample complexity for several Atari environments, while also achieving better performance in some of the games.
abstract_zh: 最近深度强化学习的成功很大程度上归功于神经架构学习和使用世界的有效内部表征的潜力。虽然当前的许多算法访问模拟器来使用大量数据进行训练，但在现实环境中，包括在玩可能与人玩的游戏时，收集经验可能会非常昂贵。在本文中，我们介绍了一种深度强化学习架构，其目的是在不牺牲性能的情况下提高样本效率。我们通过结合近年来在自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域取得的进步来设计这种架构。具体来说，我们提出了一种视觉注意力模型，该模型使用 Transformer 来学习状态表示的特征图上的自注意力机制，同时优化回报。我们凭经验证明，这种架构提高了多个 Atari 环境的样本复杂性，同时还在某些游戏中实现了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合注意力机制和视觉变换器的深度强化学习架构，旨在提高基于价值模型的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中数据收集成本高昂，需在不牺牲性能的前提下提升样本效率以降低训练成本。
AI.method: 设计视觉注意模型，利用变换器在状态特征图上学习自注意力机制，同时优化回报。
AI.result: 在多个Atari环境中显著降低样本复杂度，部分游戏性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 注意力与视觉变换器结合有效提升样本效率，为现实场景的强化学习提供新思路。

result: 在多个Atari环境中显著降低样本复杂度，部分游戏性能优于现有方法。
conclusion: 注意力与视觉变换器结合有效提升样本效率，为现实场景的强化学习提供新思路。
search_text: Improving Sample Efficiency of Value Based Models Using Attention and Vision Transformers 使用注意力和视觉变压器提高基于价值的模型的样本效率 Much of recent Deep Reinforcement Learning success is owed to the neural architecture's potential to learn and use effective internal representations of the world. While many current algorithms access a simulator to train with a large amount of data, in realistic settings, including while playing games that may be played against people, collecting experience can be quite costly. In this paper, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning architecture whose purpose is to increase sample efficiency without sacrificing performance. We design this architecture by incorporating advances achieved in recent years in the field of Natural Language Processing and Computer Vision. Specifically, we propose a visually attentive model that uses transformers to learn a self-attention mechanism on the feature maps of the state representation, while simultaneously optimizing return. We demonstrate empirically that this architecture improves sample complexity for several Atari environments, while also achieving better performance in some of the games. 最近深度强化学习的成功很大程度上归功于神经架构学习和使用世界的有效内部表征的潜力。虽然当前的许多算法访问模拟器来使用大量数据进行训练，但在现实环境中，包括在玩可能与人玩的游戏时，收集经验可能会非常昂贵。在本文中，我们介绍了一种深度强化学习架构，其目的是在不牺牲性能的情况下提高样本效率。我们通过结合近年来在自然语言处理和计算机视觉领域取得的进步来设计这种架构。具体来说，我们提出了一种视觉注意力模型，该模型使用 Transformer 来学习状态表示的特征图上的自注意力机制，同时优化回报。我们凭经验证明，这种架构提高了多个 Atari 环境的样本复杂性，同时还在某些游戏中实现了更好的性能。 本文提出一种结合注意力机制和视觉变换器的深度强化学习架构，旨在提高基于价值模型的样本效率。 Amir Ardalan Kalantari,Mohammad Amini,Sarath Chandar,Doina Precup cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Classification of Skin Cancer Images using Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络对皮肤癌图像进行分类
abstract: Skin cancer is the most common human malignancy(American Cancer Society) which is primarily diagnosed visually, starting with an initial clinical screening and followed potentially by dermoscopic(related to skin) analysis, a biopsy and histopathological examination. Skin cancer occurs when errors (mutations) occur in the DNA of skin cells. The mutations cause the cells to grow out of control and form a mass of cancer cells. The aim of this study was to try to classify images of skin lesions with the help of convolutional neural networks. The deep neural networks show humongous potential for image classification while taking into account the large variability exhibited by the environment. Here we trained images based on the pixel values and classified them on the basis of disease labels. The dataset was acquired from an Open Source Kaggle Repository(Kaggle Dataset)which itself was acquired from ISIC(International Skin Imaging Collaboration) Archive. The training was performed on multiple models accompanied with Transfer Learning. The highest model accuracy achieved was over 86.65%. The dataset used is publicly available to ensure credibility and reproducibility of the aforementioned result.
summary: Skin cancer is the most common human malignancy(American Cancer Society) which is primarily diagnosed visually, starting with an initial clinical screening and followed potentially by dermoscopic(related to skin) analysis, a biopsy and histopathological examination. Skin cancer occurs when errors (mutations) occur in the DNA of skin cells. The mutations cause the cells to grow out of control and form a mass of cancer cells. The aim of this study was to try to classify images of skin lesions with the help of convolutional neural networks. The deep neural networks show humongous potential for image classification while taking into account the large variability exhibited by the environment. Here we trained images based on the pixel values and classified them on the basis of disease labels. The dataset was acquired from an Open Source Kaggle Repository(Kaggle Dataset)which itself was acquired from ISIC(International Skin Imaging Collaboration) Archive. The training was performed on multiple models accompanied with Transfer Learning. The highest model accuracy achieved was over 86.65%. The dataset used is publicly available to ensure credibility and reproducibility of the aforementioned result.
abstract_zh: 皮肤癌是最常见的人类恶性肿瘤（美国癌症协会），主要通过视觉诊断，从初步临床筛查开始，然后可能进行皮肤镜（与皮肤相关）分析、活检和组织病理学检查。当皮肤细胞的 DNA 发生错误（突变）时，就会发生皮肤癌。这些突变导致细胞生长失控并形成大量癌细胞。本研究的目的是尝试借助卷积神经网络对皮肤病变图像进行分类。深度神经网络在图像分类方面显示出巨大的潜力，同时考虑到环境所表现出的巨大变化。在这里，我们根据像素值训练图像，并根据疾病标签对它们进行分类。该数据集是从开源 Kaggle 存储库（Kaggle 数据集）获取的，该存储库本身是从 ISIC（国际皮肤成像协作）档案库获取的。训练是在多个模型上进行的，并伴有迁移学习。模型准确率最高达到86.65%以上。使用的数据集是公开的，以确保上述结果的可信度和可重复性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用卷积神经网络对皮肤癌图像进行分类，以提高诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 皮肤癌是常见恶性肿瘤，传统诊断依赖医生经验，存在主观性。卷积神经网络在图像分类中表现优异，适合处理皮肤病变图像的复杂性。
AI.method: 基于公开的Kaggle/ISIC数据集，采用迁移学习训练多个卷积神经网络模型，通过像素值和疾病标签进行图像分类。
AI.result: 最高模型准确率达到86.65%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 卷积神经网络结合迁移学习可有效分类皮肤癌图像，公开数据集保障了研究的可信度和可复现性。

title: Fortuitous Forgetting in Connectionist Networks
title_zh: 联结主义网络中的偶然遗忘
abstract: Forgetting is often seen as an unwanted characteristic in both human and machine learning. However, we propose that forgetting can in fact be favorable to learning. We introduce "forget-and-relearn" as a powerful paradigm for shaping the learning trajectories of artificial neural networks. In this process, the forgetting step selectively removes undesirable information from the model, and the relearning step reinforces features that are consistently useful under different conditions. The forget-and-relearn framework unifies many existing iterative training algorithms in the image classification and language emergence literature, and allows us to understand the success of these algorithms in terms of the disproportionate forgetting of undesirable information. We leverage this understanding to improve upon existing algorithms by designing more targeted forgetting operations. Insights from our analysis provide a coherent view on the dynamics of iterative training in neural networks and offer a clear path towards performance improvements.
summary: Forgetting is often seen as an unwanted characteristic in both human and machine learning. However, we propose that forgetting can in fact be favorable to learning. We introduce "forget-and-relearn" as a powerful paradigm for shaping the learning trajectories of artificial neural networks. In this process, the forgetting step selectively removes undesirable information from the model, and the relearning step reinforces features that are consistently useful under different conditions. The forget-and-relearn framework unifies many existing iterative training algorithms in the image classification and language emergence literature, and allows us to understand the success of these algorithms in terms of the disproportionate forgetting of undesirable information. We leverage this understanding to improve upon existing algorithms by designing more targeted forgetting operations. Insights from our analysis provide a coherent view on the dynamics of iterative training in neural networks and offer a clear path towards performance improvements.
abstract_zh: 在人类和机器学习中，遗忘通常被视为一种不需要的特征。然而，我们认为遗忘实际上有利于学习。我们引入“忘记并重新学习”作为塑造人工神经网络学习轨迹的强大范例。在此过程中，遗忘步骤有选择地从模型中删除不需要的信息，而重新学习步骤则强化了在不同条件下始终有用的特征。遗忘和重新学习框架统一了图像分类和语言涌现文献中许多现有的迭代训练算法，并使我们能够从不成比例地遗忘不需要的信息的角度来理解这些算法的成功。我们利用这种理解，通过设计更有针对性的遗忘操作来改进现有算法。我们的分析见解提供了关于神经网络迭代训练动态的连贯观点，并为性能改进提供了清晰的路径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'忘记-再学习'的框架，通过选择性遗忘不良信息并强化有用特征，优化神经网络的学习轨迹。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为遗忘是学习中的负面因素，但作者认为适度遗忘可能有助于模型剔除干扰信息并提升学习效率。
AI.method: 设计'忘记-再学习'范式，包含两个阶段：1）选择性移除模型中不必要或干扰性的信息；2）在更新后的数据分布下重新学习关键特征，统一并改进现有迭代训练算法。
AI.result: 该框架解释了图像分类和语言生成领域多种迭代算法的成功机制，并通过更精准的遗忘操作提升了模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 遗忘机制可作为优化神经网络训练动态的有效工具，为设计更高效的学习算法提供了理论依据和实践路径。

title: DRS-LIP: Linear Inverted Pendulum Model for Legged Locomotion on Dynamic Rigid Surfaces
title_zh: DRS-LIP：动态刚性表面上腿式运动的线性倒立摆模型
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to AIM2022 concurrent submission
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures. Submitted to AIM2022 concurrent submission
abstract: Legged robot locomotion on a dynamic rigid surface (i.e., a rigid surface moving in the inertial frame) involves complex full-order dynamics that is high-dimensional, nonlinear, and time-varying. Towards deriving an analytically tractable dynamic model, this study theoretically extends the reduced-order linear inverted pendulum (LIP) model from legged locomotion on a stationary surface to locomotion on a dynamic rigid surface (DRS). The resulting model is herein termed as DRS-LIP. Furthermore, this study introduces an approximate analytical solution of the proposed DRS-LIP that is computationally efficient with high accuracy. To illustrate the practical uses of the analytical results, they are used to develop a hierarchical planning framework that efficiently generates physically feasible trajectories for DRS locomotion. The effectiveness of the proposed theoretical results and motion planner is demonstrated both through simulations and experimentally on a Laikago quadrupedal robot that walks on a rocking treadmill.
summary: Legged robot locomotion on a dynamic rigid surface (i.e., a rigid surface moving in the inertial frame) involves complex full-order dynamics that is high-dimensional, nonlinear, and time-varying. Towards deriving an analytically tractable dynamic model, this study theoretically extends the reduced-order linear inverted pendulum (LIP) model from legged locomotion on a stationary surface to locomotion on a dynamic rigid surface (DRS). The resulting model is herein termed as DRS-LIP. Furthermore, this study introduces an approximate analytical solution of the proposed DRS-LIP that is computationally efficient with high accuracy. To illustrate the practical uses of the analytical results, they are used to develop a hierarchical planning framework that efficiently generates physically feasible trajectories for DRS locomotion. The effectiveness of the proposed theoretical results and motion planner is demonstrated both through simulations and experimentally on a Laikago quadrupedal robot that walks on a rocking treadmill.
abstract_zh: 动态刚性表面（即在惯性系中移动的刚性表面）上的腿式机器人运动涉及高维、非线性和时变的复杂全阶动力学。为了推导分析上易于处理的动态模型，本研究从理论上将降阶线性倒立摆 (LIP) 模型从静止表面上的腿式运动扩展到动态刚性表面 (DRS) 上的运动。所得到的模型在本文中被称为DRS-LIP。此外，本研究介绍了所提出的 DRS-LIP 的近似解析解，该解计算效率高、精度高。为了说明分析结果的实际用途，它们被用来开发一个分层规划框架，该框架可以有效地生成 DRS 运动的物理上可行的轨迹。通过模拟和在摇摆跑步机上行走的 Laikago 四足机器人上的实验，证明了所提出的理论结果和运动规划器的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于动态刚性表面的腿部机器人运动模型DRS-LIP，并开发了相应的轨迹规划框架。
AI.motivation: 传统腿部机器人模型难以处理动态刚性表面（如移动的地面）的复杂非线性动力学问题，需建立更通用的理论模型以适应实际应用场景。
AI.method: 将静态地面的简化线性倒立摆模型扩展至动态刚性表面，推导出DRS-LIP模型并提出高效解析解；基于该模型设计分层规划框架生成可行轨迹。
AI.result: 通过仿真和Laikago四足机器人实验证明，该模型和规划方法在动态跑步机上实现了稳定行走，验证了理论有效性。
AI.conclusion: DRS-LIP模型为动态地面腿部机器人运动控制提供了计算高效的理论工具，规划框架可推广至更多复杂地形场景。

search_text: DRS-LIP: Linear Inverted Pendulum Model for Legged Locomotion on Dynamic Rigid Surfaces DRS-LIP：动态刚性表面上腿式运动的线性倒立摆模型 Legged robot locomotion on a dynamic rigid surface (i.e., a rigid surface moving in the inertial frame) involves complex full-order dynamics that is high-dimensional, nonlinear, and time-varying. Towards deriving an analytically tractable dynamic model, this study theoretically extends the reduced-order linear inverted pendulum (LIP) model from legged locomotion on a stationary surface to locomotion on a dynamic rigid surface (DRS). The resulting model is herein termed as DRS-LIP. Furthermore, this study introduces an approximate analytical solution of the proposed DRS-LIP that is computationally efficient with high accuracy. To illustrate the practical uses of the analytical results, they are used to develop a hierarchical planning framework that efficiently generates physically feasible trajectories for DRS locomotion. The effectiveness of the proposed theoretical results and motion planner is demonstrated both through simulations and experimentally on a Laikago quadrupedal robot that walks on a rocking treadmill. 动态刚性表面（即在惯性系中移动的刚性表面）上的腿式机器人运动涉及高维、非线性和时变的复杂全阶动力学。为了推导分析上易于处理的动态模型，本研究从理论上将降阶线性倒立摆 (LIP) 模型从静止表面上的腿式运动扩展到动态刚性表面 (DRS) 上的运动。所得到的模型在本文中被称为DRS-LIP。此外，本研究介绍了所提出的 DRS-LIP 的近似解析解，该解计算效率高、精度高。为了说明分析结果的实际用途，它们被用来开发一个分层规划框架，该框架可以有效地生成 DRS 运动的物理上可行的轨迹。通过模拟和在摇摆跑步机上行走的 Laikago 四足机器人上的实验，证明了所提出的理论结果和运动规划器的有效性。 本文提出了一种适用于动态刚性表面的腿部机器人运动模型DRS-LIP，并开发了相应的轨迹规划框架。 Amir Iqbal,Sushant Veer,Yan Gu cs.RO

authors_text: Aleksey A. Kocherzhenko,Nirmal Sobha Kartha,Tengfei Li,Hsin-Yi,Shih,Marco Mandic,Mike Fuller,Arshak Navruzyan
title: Evaluating Deep Vs. Wide & Deep Learners As Contextual Bandits For Personalized Email Promo Recommendations
title_zh: 评估深度与深度广泛和深入的学习者作为个性化电子邮件促销推荐的上下文强盗
abstract: Personalization enables businesses to learn customer preferences from past interactions and thus to target individual customers with more relevant content. We consider the problem of predicting the optimal promotional offer for a given customer out of several options as a contextual bandit problem. Identifying information for the customer and/or the campaign can be used to deduce unknown customer/campaign features that improve optimal offer prediction. Using a generated synthetic email promo dataset, we demonstrate similar prediction accuracies for (a) a wide and deep network that takes identifying information (or other categorical features) as input to the wide part and (b) a deep-only neural network that includes embeddings of categorical features in the input. Improvements in accuracy from including categorical features depends on the variability of the unknown numerical features for each category. We also show that selecting options using upper confidence bound or Thompson sampling, approximated via Monte Carlo dropout layers in the wide and deep models, slightly improves model performance.
summary: Personalization enables businesses to learn customer preferences from past interactions and thus to target individual customers with more relevant content. We consider the problem of predicting the optimal promotional offer for a given customer out of several options as a contextual bandit problem. Identifying information for the customer and/or the campaign can be used to deduce unknown customer/campaign features that improve optimal offer prediction. Using a generated synthetic email promo dataset, we demonstrate similar prediction accuracies for (a) a wide and deep network that takes identifying information (or other categorical features) as input to the wide part and (b) a deep-only neural network that includes embeddings of categorical features in the input. Improvements in accuracy from including categorical features depends on the variability of the unknown numerical features for each category. We also show that selecting options using upper confidence bound or Thompson sampling, approximated via Monte Carlo dropout layers in the wide and deep models, slightly improves model performance.
abstract_zh: 个性化使企业能够从过去的互动中了解客户的偏好，从而为个人客户提供更相关的内容。我们将从多个选项中预测给定客户的最佳促销优惠的问题视为上下文强盗问题。识别客户和/或活动的信息可用于推断未知的客户/活动特征，从而改进最佳报价预测。使用生成的合成电子邮件促销数据集，我们展示了以下两个类似的预测精度：(a) 将识别信息（或其他分类特征）作为宽部分的输入的宽而深的网络；以及 (b) 在输入中包含分类特征嵌入的纯深度神经网络。包含分类特征所带来的准确性提高取决于每个类别的未知数字特征的可变性。我们还表明，使用置信上限或汤普森采样（通过广度和深度模型中的蒙特卡洛丢失层进行近似）选择选项，可以略微提高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文将个性化电子邮件促销推荐问题建模为上下文老虎机问题，比较深度模型与宽深模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 通过分析客户与活动特征提升促销推荐准确性，解决传统方法难以捕捉复杂用户偏好的问题。
AI.method: 构建合成数据集，对比宽深网络与纯深度网络性能，并采用蒙特卡洛dropout实现不确定性估计。
AI.result: 两种模型预测准确率相近，但特征变异性影响效果；结合上置信界/汤普森抽样的方法使性能小幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 特征变异性决定模型增益，不确定性估计可优化推荐策略，宽深模型与深度模型在该场景下表现相当。

Wide & Deep Learners As Contextual Bandits For Personalized Email Promo Recommendations 评估深度与深度广泛和深入的学习者作为个性化电子邮件促销推荐的上下文强盗 Personalization enables businesses to learn customer preferences from past interactions and thus to target individual customers with more relevant content. Improvements in accuracy from including categorical features depends on the variability of the unknown numerical features for each category. We also show that selecting options using upper confidence bound or Thompson sampling, approximated via Monte Carlo dropout layers in the wide and deep models, slightly improves model performance. 个性化使企业能够从过去的互动中了解客户的偏好，从而为个人客户提供更相关的内容。我们将从多个选项中预测给定客户的最佳促销优惠的问题视为上下文强盗问题。识别客户和/或活动的信息可用于推断未知的客户/活动特征，从而改进最佳报价预测。使用生成的合成电子邮件促销数据集，我们展示了以下两个类似的预测精度：(a) 将识别信息（或其他分类特征）作为宽部分的输入的宽而深的网络；以及 (b) 在输入中包含分类特征嵌入的纯深度神经网络。包含分类特征所带来的准确性提高取决于每个类别的未知数字特征的可变性。我们还表明，使用置信上限或汤普森采样（通过广度和深度模型中的蒙特卡洛丢失层进行近似）选择选项，可以略微提高模型性能。 本文将个性化电子邮件促销推荐问题建模为上下文老虎机问题，比较深度模型与宽深模型的效果。 Aleksey A.
