authors_text: Pedro Miguel Sánchez Sánchez,Alberto Huertas Celdrán,Timo Schenk,Adrian Lars Benjamin Iten,Gérôme Bovet,Gregorio Martínez Pérez,Burkhard Stiller
title: Studying the Robustness of Anti-adversarial Federated Learning Models Detecting Cyberattacks in IoT Spectrum Sensors
title_zh: 研究检测物联网频谱传感器网络攻击的反对抗性联合学习模型的鲁棒性
abstract: Device fingerprinting combined with Machine and Deep Learning (ML/DL) report promising performance when detecting cyberattacks targeting data managed by resource-constrained spectrum sensors. However, the amount of data needed to train models and the privacy concerns of such scenarios limit the applicability of centralized ML/DL-based approaches. Federated learning (FL) addresses these limitations by creating federated and privacy-preserving models. However, FL is vulnerable to malicious participants, and the impact of adversarial attacks on federated models detecting spectrum sensing data falsification (SSDF) attacks on spectrum sensors has not been studied. To address this challenge, the first contribution of this work is the creation of a novel dataset suitable for FL and modeling the behavior (usage of CPU, memory, or file system, among others) of resource-constrained spectrum sensors affected by different SSDF attacks. The second contribution is a pool of experiments analyzing and comparing the robustness of federated models according to i) three families of spectrum sensors, ii) eight SSDF attacks, iii) four scenarios dealing with unsupervised (anomaly detection) and supervised (binary classification) federated models, iv) up to 33% of malicious participants implementing data and model poisoning attacks, and v) four aggregation functions acting as anti-adversarial mechanisms to increase the models robustness.
summary: Device fingerprinting combined with Machine and Deep Learning (ML/DL) report promising performance when detecting cyberattacks targeting data managed by resource-constrained spectrum sensors. However, the amount of data needed to train models and the privacy concerns of such scenarios limit the applicability of centralized ML/DL-based approaches. Federated learning (FL) addresses these limitations by creating federated and privacy-preserving models. However, FL is vulnerable to malicious participants, and the impact of adversarial attacks on federated models detecting spectrum sensing data falsification (SSDF) attacks on spectrum sensors has not been studied. To address this challenge, the first contribution of this work is the creation of a novel dataset suitable for FL and modeling the behavior (usage of CPU, memory, or file system, among others) of resource-constrained spectrum sensors affected by different SSDF attacks. The second contribution is a pool of experiments analyzing and comparing the robustness of federated models according to i) three families of spectrum sensors, ii) eight SSDF attacks, iii) four scenarios dealing with unsupervised (anomaly detection) and supervised (binary classification) federated models, iv) up to 33% of malicious participants implementing data and model poisoning attacks, and v) four aggregation functions acting as anti-adversarial mechanisms to increase the models robustness.
abstract_zh: 设备指纹识别与机器和深度学习 (ML/DL) 相结合，在检测针对资源有限的频谱传感器管理的数据的网络攻击时表现出良好的性能。然而，训练模型所需的数据量以及此类场景的隐私问题限制了集中式 ML/DL 方法的适用性。联邦学习 (FL) 通过创建联邦和隐私保护模型来解决这些限制。然而，FL 很容易受到恶意参与者的攻击，并且对抗性攻击对检测频谱传感器频谱感知数据伪造 (SSDF) 攻击的联邦模型的影响尚未研究。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作的第一个贡献是创建一个适合 FL 的新颖数据集，并对受不同 SSDF 攻击影响的资源受限频谱传感器的行为（CPU、内存或文件系统等的使用）进行建模。第二个贡献是一组实验，根据 i）三个系列的频谱传感器，ii）八种 SSDF 攻击，iii）处理无监督（异常检测）和监督（二元分类）联邦模型的四种场景，iv）高达 33％ 的恶意参与者实施数据和模型中毒攻击，以及 v）四个聚合函数作为反对抗机制来提高模型的稳健性，分析和比较联邦模型的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习模型在检测物联网频谱传感器中的网络攻击时的鲁棒性，特别是在对抗性攻击下的表现。
AI.motivation: 集中式机器学习方法在资源受限的频谱传感器场景中面临数据需求大和隐私问题，而联邦学习虽能解决这些问题，但其在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 构建适用于联邦学习的新数据集，模拟不同频谱传感器在SSDF攻击下的行为；设计实验对比三种传感器类型、八种攻击方式、四种模型场景、33%恶意参与者及四种聚合函数对模型鲁棒性的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现特定聚合函数能有效提升模型鲁棒性，恶意参与者比例和攻击类型显著影响检测性能，且不同传感器类型对攻击的敏感度存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的对抗性联邦学习框架和数据集为提升物联网频谱传感器的攻击检测鲁棒性提供了理论支持和实验依据。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 本文提出的对抗性联邦学习框架和数据集为提升物联网频谱传感器的攻击检测鲁棒性提供了理论支持和实验依据。

tldr: 本文研究联邦学习模型在检测物联网频谱传感器中的网络攻击时的鲁棒性，特别是在对抗性攻击下的表现。
motivation: 集中式机器学习方法在资源受限的频谱传感器场景中面临数据需求大和隐私问题，而联邦学习虽能解决这些问题，但其在对抗性攻击下的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究。
method: 构建适用于联邦学习的新数据集，模拟不同频谱传感器在SSDF攻击下的行为；设计实验对比三种传感器类型、八种攻击方式、四种模型场景、33%恶意参与者及四种聚合函数对模型鲁棒性的影响。
result: 实验发现特定聚合函数能有效提升模型鲁棒性，恶意参与者比例和攻击类型显著影响检测性能，且不同传感器类型对攻击的敏感度存在差异。
conclusion: 本文提出的对抗性联邦学习框架和数据集为提升物联网频谱传感器的攻击检测鲁棒性提供了理论支持和实验依据。
search_text: Studying the Robustness of Anti-adversarial Federated Learning Models Detecting Cyberattacks in IoT Spectrum Sensors 研究检测物联网频谱传感器网络攻击的反对抗性联合学习模型的鲁棒性 Device fingerprinting combined with Machine and Deep Learning (ML/DL) report promising performance when detecting cyberattacks targeting data managed by resource-constrained spectrum sensors. However, the amount of data needed to train models and the privacy concerns of such scenarios limit the applicability of centralized ML/DL-based approaches. Federated learning (FL) addresses these limitations by creating federated and privacy-preserving models. However, FL is vulnerable to malicious participants, and the impact of adversarial attacks on federated models detecting spectrum sensing data falsification (SSDF) attacks on spectrum sensors has not been studied. To address this challenge, the first contribution of this work is the creation of a novel dataset suitable for FL and modeling the behavior (usage of CPU, memory, or file system, among others) of resource-constrained spectrum sensors affected by different SSDF attacks. The second contribution is a pool of experiments analyzing and comparing the robustness of federated models according to i) three families of spectrum sensors, ii) eight SSDF attacks, iii) four scenarios dealing with unsupervised (anomaly detection) and supervised (binary classification) federated models, iv) up to 33% of malicious participants implementing data and model poisoning attacks, and v) four aggregation functions acting as anti-adversarial mechanisms to increase the models robustness. 设备指纹识别与机器和深度学习 (ML/DL) 相结合，在检测针对资源有限的频谱传感器管理的数据的网络攻击时表现出良好的性能。然而，训练模型所需的数据量以及此类场景的隐私问题限制了集中式 ML/DL 方法的适用性。联邦学习 (FL) 通过创建联邦和隐私保护模型来解决这些限制。然而，FL 很容易受到恶意参与者的攻击，并且对抗性攻击对检测频谱传感器频谱感知数据伪造 (SSDF) 攻击的联邦模型的影响尚未研究。为了应对这一挑战，这项工作的第一个贡献是创建一个适合 FL 的新颖数据集，并对受不同 SSDF 攻击影响的资源受限频谱传感器的行为（CPU、内存或文件系统等的使用）进行建模。第二个贡献是一组实验，根据 i）三个系列的频谱传感器，ii）八种 SSDF 攻击，iii）处理无监督（异常检测）和监督（二元分类）联邦模型的四种场景，iv）高达 33％ 的恶意参与者实施数据和模型中毒攻击，以及 v）四个聚合函数作为反对抗机制来提高模型的稳健性，分析和比较联邦模型的鲁棒性。 本文研究联邦学习模型在检测物联网频谱传感器中的网络攻击时的鲁棒性，特别是在对抗性攻击下的表现。 Pedro Miguel Sánchez Sánchez,Alberto Huertas Celdrán,Timo Schenk,Adrian Lars Benjamin Iten,Gérôme Bovet,Gregorio Martínez Pérez,Burkhard Stiller cs.CR,cs.AI

title: Submodularity In Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 机器学习和人工智能中的子模块性
abstract: In this manuscript, we offer a gentle review of submodularity and supermodularity and their properties. We offer a plethora of submodular definitions; a full description of a number of example submodular functions and their generalizations; example discrete constraints; a discussion of basic algorithms for maximization, minimization, and other operations; a brief overview of continuous submodular extensions; and some historical applications. We then turn to how submodularity is useful in machine learning and artificial intelligence. This includes summarization, and we offer a complete account of the differences between and commonalities amongst sketching, coresets, extractive and abstractive summarization in NLP, data distillation and condensation, and data subset selection and feature selection. We discuss a variety of ways to produce a submodular function useful for machine learning, including heuristic hand-crafting, learning or approximately learning a submodular function or aspects thereof, and some advantages of the use of a submodular function as a coreset producer. We discuss submodular combinatorial information functions, and how submodularity is useful for clustering, data partitioning, parallel machine learning, active and semi-supervised learning, probabilistic modeling, and structured norms and loss functions.
summary: In this manuscript, we offer a gentle review of submodularity and supermodularity and their properties. We offer a plethora of submodular definitions; a full description of a number of example submodular functions and their generalizations; example discrete constraints; a discussion of basic algorithms for maximization, minimization, and other operations; a brief overview of continuous submodular extensions; and some historical applications. We then turn to how submodularity is useful in machine learning and artificial intelligence. This includes summarization, and we offer a complete account of the differences between and commonalities amongst sketching, coresets, extractive and abstractive summarization in NLP, data distillation and condensation, and data subset selection and feature selection. We discuss a variety of ways to produce a submodular function useful for machine learning, including heuristic hand-crafting, learning or approximately learning a submodular function or aspects thereof, and some advantages of the use of a submodular function as a coreset producer. We discuss submodular combinatorial information functions, and how submodularity is useful for clustering, data partitioning, parallel machine learning, active and semi-supervised learning, probabilistic modeling, and structured norms and loss functions.
abstract_zh: 在这份手稿中，我们对子模块性和超模块性及其属性进行了温和的回顾。我们提供了大量的子模块定义；对一些示例子模块函数及其概括的完整描述；离散约束示例；讨论最大化、最小化和其他操作的基本算法；连续子模扩展的简要概述；以及一些历史应用。然后我们转向子模块化如何在机器学习和人工智能中发挥作用。这包括摘要，我们提供了 NLP 中的草图、核心集、提取和抽象摘要、数据蒸馏和压缩、数据子集选择和特征选择之间的差异和共性的完整说明。我们讨论了生成对机器学习有用的子模函数的各种方法，包括启发式手工制作、学习或近似学习子模函数或其方面，以及使用子模函数作为核心集生成器的一些优点。我们讨论子模组合信息函数，以及子模性如何用于聚类、数据分区、并行机器学习、主动和半监督学习、概率建模以及结构化范数和损失函数。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了次模性与超模性在机器学习与人工智能中的应用，涵盖函数定义、算法方法及多领域实例分析。
AI.motivation: 次模性作为数学性质，在数据压缩、特征选择等任务中具有独特优势，但其理论体系与应用方法需系统梳理以促进跨领域研究。
AI.method: 通过定义归纳、算法分析、连续扩展等方法，结合启发式设计与学习框架，探讨次模函数在机器学习中的构建与优化策略。
AI.result: 明确了次模性在摘要生成、聚类、主动学习等任务中的作用机制，揭示了其作为核心集生成器的理论依据与实践价值。
AI.conclusion: 次模性为机器学习提供了高效优化框架，未来需进一步探索其在复杂模型与大规模数据中的扩展应用。

title: Fundamental Limits for Sensor-Based Robot Control
title_zh: 基于传感器的机器人控制的基本限制
comment: Extended version of paper presented at the 2022 Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) conference
comments: Extended version of paper presented at the 2022 Robotics: Science and Systems (RSS) conference
abstract: Our goal is to develop theory and algorithms for establishing fundamental limits on performance imposed by a robot's sensors for a given task. In order to achieve this, we define a quantity that captures the amount of task-relevant information provided by a sensor. Using a novel version of the generalized Fano inequality from information theory, we demonstrate that this quantity provides an upper bound on the highest achievable expected reward for one-step decision making tasks. We then extend this bound to multi-step problems via a dynamic programming approach. We present algorithms for numerically computing the resulting bounds, and demonstrate our approach on three examples: (i) the lava problem from the literature on partially observable Markov decision processes, (ii) an example with continuous state and observation spaces corresponding to a robot catching a freely-falling object, and (iii) obstacle avoidance using a depth sensor with non-Gaussian noise. We demonstrate the ability of our approach to establish strong limits on achievable performance for these problems by comparing our upper bounds with achievable lower bounds (computed by synthesizing or learning concrete control policies).
summary: Our goal is to develop theory and algorithms for establishing fundamental limits on performance imposed by a robot's sensors for a given task. In order to achieve this, we define a quantity that captures the amount of task-relevant information provided by a sensor. Using a novel version of the generalized Fano inequality from information theory, we demonstrate that this quantity provides an upper bound on the highest achievable expected reward for one-step decision making tasks. We then extend this bound to multi-step problems via a dynamic programming approach. We present algorithms for numerically computing the resulting bounds, and demonstrate our approach on three examples: (i) the lava problem from the literature on partially observable Markov decision processes, (ii) an example with continuous state and observation spaces corresponding to a robot catching a freely-falling object, and (iii) obstacle avoidance using a depth sensor with non-Gaussian noise. We demonstrate the ability of our approach to establish strong limits on achievable performance for these problems by comparing our upper bounds with achievable lower bounds (computed by synthesizing or learning concrete control policies).
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是开发理论和算法，以确定机器人传感器针对给定任务所施加的性能的基本限制。为了实现这一目标，我们定义了一个量来捕获传感器提供的任务相关信息量。使用信息论中广义法诺不等式的一种新颖版本，我们证明该数量为一步决策任务的最高可实现预期奖励提供了上限。然后，我们通过动态规划方法将此界限扩展到多步骤问题。我们提出了用于数值计算结果边界的算法，并通过三个示例演示了我们的方法：（i）有关部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程的文献中的熔岩问题，（ii）与捕捉自由落体物体的机器人相对应的连续状态和观察空间的示例，以及（iii）使用具有非高斯噪声的深度传感器进行避障。通过将我们的上限与可实现的下限（通过综合或学习具体的控制策略来计算）进行比较，我们证明了我们的方法能够对这些问题的可实现性能建立严格的限制。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立理论和算法，以确定传感器对机器人执行特定任务时性能的根本限制。
AI.motivation: 理解传感器信息量如何影响机器人任务性能，是设计高效控制策略和传感器系统的基础。传统方法难以量化传感器信息与任务表现的理论界限，因此需要新的理论框架。
AI.method: 提出一种基于信息论的广义Fano不等式新版本，量化传感器提供的任务相关信息，并通过动态规划扩展至多步问题。开发数值算法计算理论上限，并在三个案例中验证。
AI.result: 在部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（如熔岩问题）、连续状态空间（如抓取自由下落物体）和非高斯噪声深度传感器避障任务中，验证了理论上限与实际策略下限的匹配性，证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为传感器受限下的机器人控制提供了理论性能边界，有助于指导传感器设计和控制算法优化，同时揭示了信息论与强化学习的交叉应用潜力。

Using a novel version of the generalized Fano inequality from information theory, we demonstrate that this quantity provides an upper bound on the highest achievable expected reward for one-step decision making tasks. We then extend this bound to multi-step problems via a dynamic programming approach. We present algorithms for numerically computing the resulting bounds, and demonstrate our approach on three examples: (i) the lava problem from the literature on partially observable Markov decision processes, (ii) an example with continuous state and observation spaces corresponding to a robot catching a freely-falling object, and (iii) obstacle avoidance using a depth sensor with non-Gaussian noise. We demonstrate the ability of our approach to establish strong limits on achievable performance for these problems by comparing our upper bounds with achievable lower bounds (computed by synthesizing or learning concrete control policies). 我们的目标是开发理论和算法，以确定机器人传感器针对给定任务所施加的性能的基本限制。为了实现这一目标，我们定义了一个量来捕获传感器提供的任务相关信息量。使用信息论中广义法诺不等式的一种新颖版本，我们证明该数量为一步决策任务的最高可实现预期奖励提供了上限。然后，我们通过动态规划方法将此界限扩展到多步骤问题。我们提出了用于数值计算结果边界的算法，并通过三个示例演示了我们的方法：（i）有关部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程的文献中的熔岩问题，（ii）与捕捉自由落体物体的机器人相对应的连续状态和观察空间的示例，以及（iii）使用具有非高斯噪声的深度传感器进行避障。通过将我们的上限与可实现的下限（通过综合或学习具体的控制策略来计算）进行比较，我们证明了我们的方法能够对这些问题的可实现性能建立严格的限制。 本文旨在建立理论和算法，以确定传感器对机器人执行特定任务时性能的根本限制。 Anirudha Majumdar,Zhiting Mei,Vincent Pacelli cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.IT,cs.LG,math.OC

title: 3D Visualization and Spatial Data Mining for Analysis of LULC Images
title_zh: 用于 LULC 图像分析的 3D 可视化和空间数据挖掘
abstract: The present study is an attempt made to create a new tool for the analysis of Land Use Land Cover (LUCL) images in 3D visualization. This study mainly uses spatial data mining techniques on high resolution LULC satellite imagery. Visualization of feature space allows exploration of patterns in the image data and insight into the classification process and related uncertainty. Visual Data Mining provides added value to image classifications as the user can be involved in the classification process providing increased confidence in and understanding of the results. In this study, we present a prototype of image segmentation, K-Means clustering and 3D visualization tool for visual data mining (VDM) of LUCL satellite imagery into volume visualization. This volume based representation divides feature space into spheres or voxels. The visualization tool is showcased in a classification study of high-resolution LULC imagery of Latur district (Maharashtra state, India) is used as sample data.
summary: The present study is an attempt made to create a new tool for the analysis of Land Use Land Cover (LUCL) images in 3D visualization. This study mainly uses spatial data mining techniques on high resolution LULC satellite imagery. Visualization of feature space allows exploration of patterns in the image data and insight into the classification process and related uncertainty. Visual Data Mining provides added value to image classifications as the user can be involved in the classification process providing increased confidence in and understanding of the results. In this study, we present a prototype of image segmentation, K-Means clustering and 3D visualization tool for visual data mining (VDM) of LUCL satellite imagery into volume visualization. This volume based representation divides feature space into spheres or voxels. The visualization tool is showcased in a classification study of high-resolution LULC imagery of Latur district (Maharashtra state, India) is used as sample data.
abstract_zh: 本研究试图创建一种新工具来分析 3D 可视化中的土地利用土地覆盖 (LUCL) 图像。本研究主要在高分辨率 LULC 卫星图像上使用空间数据挖掘技术。特征空间的可视化允许探索图像数据中的模式并深入了解分类过程和相关的不确定性。视觉数据挖掘为图像分类提供了附加值，因为用户可以参与分类过程，从而增强对结果的信心和理解。在这项研究中，我们提出了图像分割、K-Means 聚类和 3D 可视化工具的原型，用于将 LUCL 卫星图像的视觉数据挖掘 (VDM) 转化为体积可视化。这种基于体积的表示将特征空间划分为球体或体素。该可视化工具在 Latur 地区（印度马哈拉施特拉邦）高分辨率 LULC 图像的分类研究中展示，该图像用作样本数据。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一个结合三维可视化与空间数据挖掘的工具，用于分析高分辨率土地利用/土地覆盖（LULC）卫星图像。
AI.motivation: 传统LULC图像分析方法缺乏交互性与直观性，用户难以理解分类过程及不确定性，需通过可视化增强分类准确性与用户参与度。
AI.method: 采用图像分割、K-Means聚类算法及三维可视化技术，将特征空间划分为球体或体素，构建体积可视化工具进行视觉数据挖掘（VDM）。
AI.result: 通过印度Latur地区高分辨率LULC图像案例验证，该工具有效提升了分类过程的可视化效果与用户对结果的理解信心。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的三维可视化工具为LULC分析提供了交互式数据挖掘新方法，增强了分类透明度，未来可进一步优化算法与扩展应用场景。

authors_text: Anuj Mahajan,Mikayel Samvelyan,Tarun Gupta,Benjamin Ellis,Mingfei Sun,Tim Rocktäschel,Shimon Whiteson
title: Generalization in Cooperative Multi-Agent Systems
title_zh: 协作多智能体系统的泛化
abstract: Collective intelligence is a fundamental trait shared by several species of living organisms. It has allowed them to thrive in the diverse environmental conditions that exist on our planet. From simple organisations in an ant colony to complex systems in human groups, collective intelligence is vital for solving complex survival tasks. As is commonly observed, such natural systems are flexible to changes in their structure. Specifically, they exhibit a high degree of generalization when the abilities or the total number of agents changes within a system. We term this phenomenon as Combinatorial Generalization (CG). CG is a highly desirable trait for autonomous systems as it can increase their utility and deployability across a wide range of applications. While recent works addressing specific aspects of CG have shown impressive results on complex domains, they provide no performance guarantees when generalizing towards novel situations. In this work, we shed light on the theoretical underpinnings of CG for cooperative multi-agent systems (MAS). Specifically, we study generalization bounds under a linear dependence of the underlying dynamics on the agent capabilities, which can be seen as a generalization of Successor Features to MAS. We then extend the results first for Lipschitz and then arbitrary dependence of rewards on team capabilities. Finally, empirical analysis on various domains using the framework of multi-agent reinforcement learning highlights important desiderata for multi-agent algorithms towards ensuring CG.
summary: Collective intelligence is a fundamental trait shared by several species of living organisms. It has allowed them to thrive in the diverse environmental conditions that exist on our planet. From simple organisations in an ant colony to complex systems in human groups, collective intelligence is vital for solving complex survival tasks. As is commonly observed, such natural systems are flexible to changes in their structure. Specifically, they exhibit a high degree of generalization when the abilities or the total number of agents changes within a system. We term this phenomenon as Combinatorial Generalization (CG). CG is a highly desirable trait for autonomous systems as it can increase their utility and deployability across a wide range of applications. While recent works addressing specific aspects of CG have shown impressive results on complex domains, they provide no performance guarantees when generalizing towards novel situations. In this work, we shed light on the theoretical underpinnings of CG for cooperative multi-agent systems (MAS). Specifically, we study generalization bounds under a linear dependence of the underlying dynamics on the agent capabilities, which can be seen as a generalization of Successor Features to MAS. We then extend the results first for Lipschitz and then arbitrary dependence of rewards on team capabilities. Finally, empirical analysis on various domains using the framework of multi-agent reinforcement learning highlights important desiderata for multi-agent algorithms towards ensuring CG.
abstract_zh: 集体智慧是多种生物体共有的基本特征。它使它们能够在我们星球上存在的多样化环境条件下茁壮成长。从蚁群中的简单组织到人类群体中的复杂系统，集体智慧对于解决复杂的生存任务至关重要。正如人们普遍观察到的那样，这种自然系统对其结构的变化是灵活的。具体来说，当系统内代理的能力或总数发生变化时，它们表现出高度的泛化性。我们将这种现象称为组合泛化（CG）。 CG 是自主系统非常理想的特征，因为它可以提高其在各种应用程序中的实用性和可部署性。虽然最近针对 CG 特定方面的研究在复杂领域中取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但它们在推广到新情况时并没有提供性能保证。在这项工作中，我们阐明了协作多智能体系统 (MAS) 的 CG 理论基础。具体来说，我们研究了底层动态对代理能力的线性依赖性下的泛化界限，这可以看作是 MAS 的后继特征的泛化。然后，我们首先扩展 Lipschitz 的结果，然后扩展奖励对团队能力的任意依赖性。最后，使用多智能体强化学习框架对各个领域进行的实证分析强调了多智能体算法确保 CG 的重要需求。

AI.tldr: 本文研究合作多智能体系统中的组合泛化（CG）现象，通过理论分析和实验验证其在动态变化下的性能保证。
AI.motivation: 自然系统（如蚁群）在结构变化时表现出强泛化能力，而现有自主系统缺乏对新型场景的性能保障，需理论支撑以提升适用性。
AI.method: 基于线性动态依赖的理论分析，扩展至Lipschitz及任意奖励函数依赖，并通过多智能体强化学习框架进行实验验证。
AI.result: 推导出组合泛化理论界，揭示了智能体能力变化对系统性能的影响，并通过实验验证了算法设计的关键需求。
AI.conclusion: 提出面向组合泛化的理论框架与实证分析方法，为多智能体算法设计提供了确保泛化能力的指导原则。

authors_text: Mohammad Amin Haghpanah,Ehsan Saeedizade,Mehdi Tale Masouleh,Ahmad Kalhor
title: Real-Time Facial Expression Recognition using Facial Landmarks and Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用面部标志和神经网络进行实时面部表情识别
abstract: This paper presents a lightweight algorithm for feature extraction, classification of seven different emotions, and facial expression recognition in a real-time manner based on static images of the human face. In this regard, a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) neural network is trained based on the foregoing algorithm. In order to classify human faces, first, some pre-processing is applied to the input image, which can localize and cut out faces from it. In the next step, a facial landmark detection library is used, which can detect the landmarks of each face. Then, the human face is split into upper and lower faces, which enables the extraction of the desired features from each part. In the proposed model, both geometric and texture-based feature types are taken into account. After the feature extraction phase, a normalized vector of features is created. A 3-layer MLP is trained using these feature vectors, leading to 96% accuracy on the test set.
summary: This paper presents a lightweight algorithm for feature extraction, classification of seven different emotions, and facial expression recognition in a real-time manner based on static images of the human face. In this regard, a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) neural network is trained based on the foregoing algorithm. In order to classify human faces, first, some pre-processing is applied to the input image, which can localize and cut out faces from it. In the next step, a facial landmark detection library is used, which can detect the landmarks of each face. Then, the human face is split into upper and lower faces, which enables the extraction of the desired features from each part. In the proposed model, both geometric and texture-based feature types are taken into account. After the feature extraction phase, a normalized vector of features is created. A 3-layer MLP is trained using these feature vectors, leading to 96% accuracy on the test set.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种轻量级算法，用于基于人脸静态图像的特征提取、七种不同情绪的分类以及实时面部表情识别。对此，基于上述算法来训练多层感知器(MLP)神经网络。为了对人脸进行分类，首先对输入图像进行一些预处理，可以从中定位并剪切出人脸。下一步，使用面部标志检测库，它可以检测每张脸的标志。然后，将人脸分为上脸和下脸，这样就可以从每个部分提取所需的特征。在所提出的模型中，考虑了几何和基于纹理的特征类型。在特征提取阶段之后，创建特征的归一化向量。使用这些特征向量训练 3 层 MLP，在测试集上的准确率达到 96%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于面部标志点和神经网络的实时面部表情识别方法，通过静态图像实现七种情绪分类。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别方法在实时性或准确性上存在不足，需设计轻量级算法以提高处理效率和分类精度。
AI.method: 采用预处理定位人脸、面部标志点检测分割上下脸、融合几何与纹理特征，并使用3层MLP神经网络进行分类。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到96%的分类准确率，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合多特征提取与轻量级神经网络的设计有效提升了实时表情识别性能，未来可扩展至更多表情类别或优化处理速度。

search_text: Real-Time Facial Expression Recognition using Facial Landmarks and Neural Networks 使用面部标志和神经网络进行实时面部表情识别 This paper presents a lightweight algorithm for feature extraction, classification of seven different emotions, and facial expression recognition in a real-time manner based on static images of the human face. In this regard, a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) neural network is trained based on the foregoing algorithm. In order to classify human faces, first, some pre-processing is applied to the input image, which can localize and cut out faces from it. In the next step, a facial landmark detection library is used, which can detect the landmarks of each face. Then, the human face is split into upper and lower faces, which enables the extraction of the desired features from each part. In the proposed model, both geometric and texture-based feature types are taken into account. After the feature extraction phase, a normalized vector of features is created. A 3-layer MLP is trained using these feature vectors, leading to 96% accuracy on the test set. 本文提出了一种轻量级算法，用于基于人脸静态图像的特征提取、七种不同情绪的分类以及实时面部表情识别。对此，基于上述算法来训练多层感知器(MLP)神经网络。为了对人脸进行分类，首先对输入图像进行一些预处理，可以从中定位并剪切出人脸。下一步，使用面部标志检测库，它可以检测每张脸的标志。然后，将人脸分为上脸和下脸，这样就可以从每个部分提取所需的特征。在所提出的模型中，考虑了几何和基于纹理的特征类型。在特征提取阶段之后，创建特征的归一化向量。使用这些特征向量训练 3 层 MLP，在测试集上的准确率达到 96%。 提出一种基于面部标志点和神经网络的实时面部表情识别方法，通过静态图像实现七种情绪分类。 Mohammad Amin Haghpanah,Ehsan Saeedizade,Mehdi Tale Masouleh,Ahmad Kalhor cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Self-supervised Graphs for Audio Representation Learning with Limited Labeled Data
title_zh: 用于具有有限标记数据的音频表示学习的自监督图
abstract: Large scale databases with high-quality manual annotations are scarce in audio domain. We thus explore a self-supervised graph approach to learning audio representations from highly limited labelled data. Considering each audio sample as a graph node, we propose a subgraph-based framework with novel self-supervision tasks that can learn effective audio representations. During training, subgraphs are constructed by sampling the entire pool of available training data to exploit the relationship between the labelled and unlabeled audio samples. During inference, we use random edges to alleviate the overhead of graph construction. We evaluate our model on three benchmark audio databases, and two tasks: acoustic event detection and speech emotion recognition. Our semi-supervised model performs better or on par with fully supervised models and outperforms several competitive existing models. Our model is compact (240k parameters), and can produce generalized audio representations that are robust to different types of signal noise.
summary: Large scale databases with high-quality manual annotations are scarce in audio domain. We thus explore a self-supervised graph approach to learning audio representations from highly limited labelled data. Considering each audio sample as a graph node, we propose a subgraph-based framework with novel self-supervision tasks that can learn effective audio representations. During training, subgraphs are constructed by sampling the entire pool of available training data to exploit the relationship between the labelled and unlabeled audio samples. During inference, we use random edges to alleviate the overhead of graph construction. We evaluate our model on three benchmark audio databases, and two tasks: acoustic event detection and speech emotion recognition. Our semi-supervised model performs better or on par with fully supervised models and outperforms several competitive existing models. Our model is compact (240k parameters), and can produce generalized audio representations that are robust to different types of signal noise.
abstract_zh: 音频领域缺乏具有高质量手动注释的大型数据库。因此，我们探索一种自监督图方法，从高度有限的标记数据中学习音频表示。将每个音频样本视为一个图节点，我们提出了一个基于子图的框架，该框架具有新颖的自我监督任务，可以学习有效的音频表示。在训练期间，通过对整个可用训练数据池进行采样来构建子图，以利用标记和未标记音频样本之间的关系。在推理过程中，我们使用随机边来减轻图构建的开销。我们在三个基准音频数据库和两个任务上评估我们的模型：声学事件检测和语音情感识别。我们的半监督模型表现更好或与完全监督模型相当，并且优于几个有竞争力的现有模型。我们的模型很紧凑（240k 参数），并且可以生成对不同类型的信号噪声具有鲁棒性的通用音频表示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自监督图的音频表示学习方法，旨在利用有限的标注数据学习有效的音频表示。
AI.motivation: 音频领域高质量标注数据稀缺，传统全监督方法依赖大量标注数据，而本文通过自监督图学习框架减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 将每个音频样本视为图节点，构建子图框架并设计新型自监督任务。训练时通过采样构造子图挖掘标注与未标注样本关系，推理时使用随机边降低图构建开销。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据库的声学事件检测和语音情感识别任务中，半监督模型性能优于或媲美全监督模型，参数量仅240k且对噪声鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在有限标注数据下能生成通用且鲁棒的音频表示，为音频领域少样本学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: Semi-supervised Identification and Mapping of Surface Water Extent using Street-level Monitoring Videos
title_zh: 使用街道监测视频进行地表水范围的半监督识别和绘图
abstract: Urban flooding is becoming a common and devastating hazard to cause life loss and economic damage. Monitoring and understanding urban flooding in the local scale is a challenging task due to the complicated urban landscape, intricate hydraulic process, and the lack of high-quality and resolution data. The emerging smart city technology such as monitoring cameras provides an unprecedented opportunity to address the data issue. However, estimating the water accumulation on the land surface based on the monitoring footage is unreliable using the traditional segmentation technique because the boundary of the water accumulation, under the influence of varying weather, background, and illumination, is usually too fuzzy to identify, and the oblique angle and image distortion in the video monitoring data prevents georeferencing and object-based measurements. This paper presents a novel semi-supervised segmentation scheme for surface water extent recognition from the footage of an oblique monitoring camera. The semi-supervised segmentation algorithm was found suitable to determine the water boundary and the monoplotting method was successfully applied to georeference the pixels of the monitoring video for the virtual quantification of the local drainage process. The correlation and mechanism-based analysis demonstrates the value of the proposed method in advancing the understanding of local drainage hydraulics. The workflow and created methods in this study has a great potential to study other street-level and earth surface processes.
summary: Urban flooding is becoming a common and devastating hazard to cause life loss and economic damage. Monitoring and understanding urban flooding in the local scale is a challenging task due to the complicated urban landscape, intricate hydraulic process, and the lack of high-quality and resolution data. The emerging smart city technology such as monitoring cameras provides an unprecedented opportunity to address the data issue. However, estimating the water accumulation on the land surface based on the monitoring footage is unreliable using the traditional segmentation technique because the boundary of the water accumulation, under the influence of varying weather, background, and illumination, is usually too fuzzy to identify, and the oblique angle and image distortion in the video monitoring data prevents georeferencing and object-based measurements. This paper presents a novel semi-supervised segmentation scheme for surface water extent recognition from the footage of an oblique monitoring camera. The semi-supervised segmentation algorithm was found suitable to determine the water boundary and the monoplotting method was successfully applied to georeference the pixels of the monitoring video for the virtual quantification of the local drainage process. The correlation and mechanism-based analysis demonstrates the value of the proposed method in advancing the understanding of local drainage hydraulics. The workflow and created methods in this study has a great potential to study other street-level and earth surface processes.
abstract_zh: 城市洪水正在成为一种常见的破坏性灾害，造成生命损失和经济损失。由于复杂的城市景观、复杂的水力过程以及缺乏高质量和分辨率的数据，监测和了解局部尺度的城市洪水是一项具有挑战性的任务。监控摄像头等新兴智慧城市技术为解决数据问题提供了前所未有的机会。然而，利用传统的分割技术基于监控录像来估计地表积水量并不可靠，因为受天气、背景和光照变化的影响，积水量的边界通常过于模糊而难以识别，而且视频监测数据中的倾斜角度和图像失真阻碍了地理配准和基于对象的测量。本文提出了一种新颖的半监督分割方案，用于根据倾斜监控摄像机的镜头识别地表水范围。半监督分割算法适合确定水边界，并且单标图方法成功应用于对监控视频的像素进行地理配准，以实现局部排水过程的虚拟量化。相关性和基于机制的分析证明了所提出的方法在增进对当地排水水力学的理解方面的价值。本研究中的工作流程和创建的方法对于研究其他街道和地球表面过程具有巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督分割方案，利用街景监控视频识别地表水体范围，并通过单图投影方法实现像素级地理定位，以量化局部排水过程。
AI.motivation: 城市内涝监测因数据质量低、传统分割技术受限于天气、光照及视频畸变等因素而面临挑战，亟需利用智能城市监控摄像头数据改进监测手段。
AI.method: 结合半监督分割算法识别水体边界，并采用单图投影方法对监控视频像素进行地理配准，实现虚拟量化分析。
AI.result: 该方法有效解决了水体边界模糊和视频畸变问题，成功实现了排水过程的地理量化，验证了其在局部水文机制研究中的价值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为街景级地表过程研究提供了可行技术路径，具有推广至其他城市水文和地球表面过程分析的潜力。

result: 该方法有效解决了水体边界模糊和视频畸变问题，成功实现了排水过程的地理量化，验证了其在局部水文机制研究中的价值。
conclusion: 该方法为街景级地表过程研究提供了可行技术路径，具有推广至其他城市水文和地球表面过程分析的潜力。
search_text: Semi-supervised Identification and Mapping of Surface Water Extent using Street-level Monitoring Videos 使用街道监测视频进行地表水范围的半监督识别和绘图 Urban flooding is becoming a common and devastating hazard to cause life loss and economic damage. Monitoring and understanding urban flooding in the local scale is a challenging task due to the complicated urban landscape, intricate hydraulic process, and the lack of high-quality and resolution data. The emerging smart city technology such as monitoring cameras provides an unprecedented opportunity to address the data issue. However, estimating the water accumulation on the land surface based on the monitoring footage is unreliable using the traditional segmentation technique because the boundary of the water accumulation, under the influence of varying weather, background, and illumination, is usually too fuzzy to identify, and the oblique angle and image distortion in the video monitoring data prevents georeferencing and object-based measurements. This paper presents a novel semi-supervised segmentation scheme for surface water extent recognition from the footage of an oblique monitoring camera. The semi-supervised segmentation algorithm was found suitable to determine the water boundary and the monoplotting method was successfully applied to georeference the pixels of the monitoring video for the virtual quantification of the local drainage process. The correlation and mechanism-based analysis demonstrates the value of the proposed method in advancing the understanding of local drainage hydraulics. The workflow and created methods in this study has a great potential to study other street-level and earth surface processes. 城市洪水正在成为一种常见的破坏性灾害，造成生命损失和经济损失。由于复杂的城市景观、复杂的水力过程以及缺乏高质量和分辨率的数据，监测和了解局部尺度的城市洪水是一项具有挑战性的任务。监控摄像头等新兴智慧城市技术为解决数据问题提供了前所未有的机会。然而，利用传统的分割技术基于监控录像来估计地表积水量并不可靠，因为受天气、背景和光照变化的影响，积水量的边界通常过于模糊而难以识别，而且视频监测数据中的倾斜角度和图像失真阻碍了地理配准和基于对象的测量。本文提出了一种新颖的半监督分割方案，用于根据倾斜监控摄像机的镜头识别地表水范围。半监督分割算法适合确定水边界，并且单标图方法成功应用于对监控视频的像素进行地理配准，以实现局部排水过程的虚拟量化。相关性和基于机制的分析证明了所提出的方法在增进对当地排水水力学的理解方面的价值。本研究中的工作流程和创建的方法对于研究其他街道和地球表面过程具有巨大的潜力。 本文提出一种半监督分割方案，利用街景监控视频识别地表水体范围，并通过单图投影方法实现像素级地理定位，以量化局部排水过程。 Ruo-Qian Wang,Yangmin Ding cs.CV

authors_text: Viet Quoc Vo,Ehsan Abbasnejad,Damith C. Ranasinghe
title: Query Efficient Decision Based Sparse Attacks Against Black-Box Deep Learning Models
title_zh: 针对黑盒深度学习模型的基于查询高效决策的稀疏攻击
comment: Published as a conference paper at the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022). Code is available at https://sparseevoattack.github.io/
comments: Published as a conference paper at the International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR 2022). Code is available at https://sparseevoattack.github.io/
abstract: Despite our best efforts, deep learning models remain highly vulnerable to even tiny adversarial perturbations applied to the inputs. The ability to extract information from solely the output of a machine learning model to craft adversarial perturbations to black-box models is a practical threat against real-world systems, such as autonomous cars or machine learning models exposed as a service (MLaaS). Of particular interest are sparse attacks. The realization of sparse attacks in black-box models demonstrates that machine learning models are more vulnerable than we believe. Because these attacks aim to minimize the number of perturbed pixels measured by l_0 norm-required to mislead a model by solely observing the decision (the predicted label) returned to a model query; the so-called decision-based attack setting. But, such an attack leads to an NP-hard optimization problem. We develop an evolution-based algorithm-SparseEvo-for the problem and evaluate against both convolutional deep neural networks and vision transformers. Notably, vision transformers are yet to be investigated under a decision-based attack setting. SparseEvo requires significantly fewer model queries than the state-of-the-art sparse attack Pointwise for both untargeted and targeted attacks. The attack algorithm, although conceptually simple, is also competitive with only a limited query budget against the state-of-the-art gradient-based whitebox attacks in standard computer vision tasks such as ImageNet. Importantly, the query efficient SparseEvo, along with decision-based attacks, in general, raise new questions regarding the safety of deployed systems and poses new directions to study and understand the robustness of machine learning models.
summary: Despite our best efforts, deep learning models remain highly vulnerable to even tiny adversarial perturbations applied to the inputs. The ability to extract information from solely the output of a machine learning model to craft adversarial perturbations to black-box models is a practical threat against real-world systems, such as autonomous cars or machine learning models exposed as a service (MLaaS). Of particular interest are sparse attacks. The realization of sparse attacks in black-box models demonstrates that machine learning models are more vulnerable than we believe. Because these attacks aim to minimize the number of perturbed pixels measured by l_0 norm-required to mislead a model by solely observing the decision (the predicted label) returned to a model query; the so-called decision-based attack setting. But, such an attack leads to an NP-hard optimization problem. We develop an evolution-based algorithm-SparseEvo-for the problem and evaluate against both convolutional deep neural networks and vision transformers. Notably, vision transformers are yet to be investigated under a decision-based attack setting. SparseEvo requires significantly fewer model queries than the state-of-the-art sparse attack Pointwise for both untargeted and targeted attacks. The attack algorithm, although conceptually simple, is also competitive with only a limited query budget against the state-of-the-art gradient-based whitebox attacks in standard computer vision tasks such as ImageNet. Importantly, the query efficient SparseEvo, along with decision-based attacks, in general, raise new questions regarding the safety of deployed systems and poses new directions to study and understand the robustness of machine learning models.
abstract_zh: 尽管我们尽了最大努力，深度学习模型仍然非常容易受到输入中微小的对抗性扰动的影响。仅从机器学习模型的输出中提取信息以对黑盒模型进行对抗性扰动的能力对现实世界的系统（例如自动驾驶汽车或作为服务公开的机器学习模型（MLaaS））构成了实际威胁。特别令人感兴趣的是稀疏攻击。黑盒模型中稀疏攻击的实现表明，机器学习模型比我们想象的更容易受到攻击。因为这些攻击的目的是通过仅观察返回到模型查询的决策（预测标签）来最小化由 l_0 范数测量的扰动像素的数量，从而误导模型；所谓基于决策的攻击设置。但是，这种攻击会导致 NP 难优化问题。我们针对该问题开发了一种基于进化的算法——SparseEvo，并针对卷积深度神经网络和视觉转换器进行评估。值得注意的是，视觉转换器尚未在基于决策的攻击环境下进行研究。对于非目标攻击和目标攻击，SparseEvo 所需的模型查询比最先进的稀疏攻击 Pointwise 少得多。该攻击算法虽然概念上很简单，但仅以有限的查询预算与 ImageNet 等标准计算机视觉任务中最先进的基于梯度的白盒攻击相比具有竞争力。重要的是，查询效率高的 SparseEvo 以及基于决策的攻击通常会提出有关已部署系统安全性的新问题，并为研究和理解机器学习模型的稳健性提出新的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SparseEvo的高效稀疏攻击方法，针对黑盒深度学习模型的决策结果进行攻击，通过最小化扰动像素数量实现对抗样本生成。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏攻击方法在黑盒场景下查询效率低下，且对视觉Transformer等新型模型的研究不足，亟需更高效的攻击算法以揭示模型安全性问题。
AI.method: 基于进化算法设计SparseEvo，通过迭代优化扰动像素集合，在决策结果反馈下实现对卷积神经网络和视觉Transformer的稀疏攻击。
AI.result: SparseEvo在未针对和针对攻击场景下均显著减少模型查询次数，且在ImageNet等标准任务中可竞争白盒梯度攻击效果，首次验证视觉Transformer在决策攻击下的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了黑盒模型在稀疏攻击下的新脆弱性，为机器学习系统的安全评估提供了新视角，同时推动了对抗鲁棒性研究的方向演进。

authors_text: Yuzhe Lu,Haichun Yang,Zuhayr Asad,Zheyu Zhu,Tianyuan Yao,Jiachen Xu,Agnes B. Fogo,Yuankai Huo
title: Holistic Fine-grained GGS Characterization: From Detection to Unbalanced Classification
title_zh: 整体细粒度 GGS 表征：从检测到不平衡分类
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated the diagnostic and prognostic values of global glomerulosclerosis (GGS) in IgA nephropathy, aging, and end-stage renal disease. However, the fine-grained quantitative analysis of multiple GGS subtypes (e.g., obsolescent, solidified, and disappearing glomerulosclerosis) is typically a resource extensive manual process. Very few automatic methods, if any, have been developed to bridge this gap for such analytics. In this paper, we present a holistic pipeline to quantify GGS (with both detection and classification) from a whole slide image in a fully automatic manner. In addition, we conduct the fine-grained classification for the sub-types of GGS. Our study releases the open-source quantitative analytical tool for fine-grained GGS characterization while tackling the technical challenges in unbalanced classification and integrating detection and classification.
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated the diagnostic and prognostic values of global glomerulosclerosis (GGS) in IgA nephropathy, aging, and end-stage renal disease. However, the fine-grained quantitative analysis of multiple GGS subtypes (e.g., obsolescent, solidified, and disappearing glomerulosclerosis) is typically a resource extensive manual process. Very few automatic methods, if any, have been developed to bridge this gap for such analytics. In this paper, we present a holistic pipeline to quantify GGS (with both detection and classification) from a whole slide image in a fully automatic manner. In addition, we conduct the fine-grained classification for the sub-types of GGS. Our study releases the open-source quantitative analytical tool for fine-grained GGS characterization while tackling the technical challenges in unbalanced classification and integrating detection and classification.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究证明了整体性肾小球硬化症 (GGS) 在 IgA 肾病、衰老和终末期肾病中的诊断和预后价值。然而，多种 GGS 亚型（例如，老化、凝固和消失的肾小球硬化症）的细粒度定量分析通常是一个资源丰富的手动过程。很少有人开发出自动方法（如果有的话）来弥补此类分析的这一差距。在本文中，我们提出了一个整体流程，以全自动方式从整个幻灯片图像中量化 GGS（包括检测和分类）。此外，我们对GGS的子类型进行了细粒度的分类。我们的研究发布了用于细粒度 GGS 表征的开源定量分析工具，同时解决了不平衡分类以及集成检测和分类的技术挑战。

AI.tldr: 提出一种全自动方法对肾小球硬化（GGS）进行细粒度定量分析，涵盖检测与分类，并解决不平衡分类问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GGS细粒度分析依赖人工，耗时耗力，缺乏自动化工具，需开发高效方法提升分析效率与准确性。
AI.method: 设计端到端自动管道，集成目标检测与细粒度分类模型，采用技术手段应对类别不平衡问题。
AI.result: 实现全自动GGS量化分析工具，有效处理不平衡分类，提升分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为GGS分析提供开源工具，推动病理图像自动化分析，助力相关疾病研究与临床诊断。

Our study releases the open-source quantitative analytical tool for fine-grained GGS characterization while tackling the technical challenges in unbalanced classification and integrating detection and classification. 最近的研究证明了整体性肾小球硬化症 (GGS) 在 IgA 肾病、衰老和终末期肾病中的诊断和预后价值。然而，多种 GGS 亚型（例如，老化、凝固和消失的肾小球硬化症）的细粒度定量分析通常是一个资源丰富的手动过程。很少有人开发出自动方法（如果有的话）来弥补此类分析的这一差距。在本文中，我们提出了一个整体流程，以全自动方式从整个幻灯片图像中量化 GGS（包括检测和分类）。此外，我们对GGS的子类型进行了细粒度的分类。我们的研究发布了用于细粒度 GGS 表征的开源定量分析工具，同时解决了不平衡分类以及集成检测和分类的技术挑战。 提出一种全自动方法对肾小球硬化（GGS）进行细粒度定量分析，涵盖检测与分类，并解决不平衡分类问题。 Yuzhe Lu,Haichun Yang,Zuhayr Asad,Zheyu Zhu,Tianyuan Yao,Jiachen Xu,Agnes B. Fogo,Yuankai Huo eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Mingfei Sun,Vitaly Kurin,Guoqing Liu,Sam Devlin,Tao Qin,Katja Hofmann,Shimon Whiteson
title: You May Not Need Ratio Clipping in PPO
title_zh: 您可能不需要 PPO 中的比率裁剪
abstract: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) methods learn a policy by iteratively performing multiple mini-batch optimization epochs of a surrogate objective with one set of sampled data. Ratio clipping PPO is a popular variant that clips the probability ratios between the target policy and the policy used to collect samples. Ratio clipping yields a pessimistic estimate of the original surrogate objective, and has been shown to be crucial for strong performance. We show in this paper that such ratio clipping may not be a good option as it can fail to effectively bound the ratios. Instead, one can directly optimize the original surrogate objective for multiple epochs; the key is to find a proper condition to early stop the optimization epoch in each iteration. Our theoretical analysis sheds light on how to determine when to stop the optimization epoch, and call the resulting algorithm Early Stopping Policy Optimization (ESPO). We compare ESPO with PPO across many continuous control tasks and show that ESPO significantly outperforms PPO. Furthermore, we show that ESPO can be easily scaled up to distributed training with many workers, delivering strong performance as well.
summary: Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) methods learn a policy by iteratively performing multiple mini-batch optimization epochs of a surrogate objective with one set of sampled data. Ratio clipping PPO is a popular variant that clips the probability ratios between the target policy and the policy used to collect samples. Ratio clipping yields a pessimistic estimate of the original surrogate objective, and has been shown to be crucial for strong performance. We show in this paper that such ratio clipping may not be a good option as it can fail to effectively bound the ratios. Instead, one can directly optimize the original surrogate objective for multiple epochs; the key is to find a proper condition to early stop the optimization epoch in each iteration. Our theoretical analysis sheds light on how to determine when to stop the optimization epoch, and call the resulting algorithm Early Stopping Policy Optimization (ESPO). We compare ESPO with PPO across many continuous control tasks and show that ESPO significantly outperforms PPO. Furthermore, we show that ESPO can be easily scaled up to distributed training with many workers, delivering strong performance as well.
abstract_zh: 近端策略优化 (PPO) 方法通过使用一组采样数据迭代执行代理目标的多个小批量优化时期来学习策略。比率剪裁 PPO 是一种流行的变体，它剪裁目标策略和用于收集样本的策略之间的概率比。比率裁剪会产生对原始替代目标的悲观估计，并且已被证明对于良好的性能至关重要。我们在本文中表明，这种比率裁剪可能不是一个好的选择，因为它可能无法有效地限制比率。相反，我们可以直接优化多个时期的原始代理目标；关键是找到一个合适的条件来提前停止每次迭代中的优化周期。我们的理论分析揭示了如何确定何时停止优化时期，并将所得算法称为早期停止策略优化（ESPO）。我们在许多连续控制任务中将 ESPO 与 PPO 进行比较，结果表明 ESPO 显着优于 PPO。此外，我们还表明 ESPO 可以轻松扩展到对许多员工进行分布式培训，并提供出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的PPO算法ESPO，通过取消概率比值裁剪并采用早停机制，显著提升了连续控制任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统PPO中的概率比值裁剪可能无法有效限制比值范围，导致优化效果受限，需要探索更优的替代方案。
AI.method: 直接优化原始目标函数，并通过理论分析设计早停条件，提出Early Stopping Policy Optimization (ESPO)算法。
AI.result: ESPO在多个连续控制任务中显著优于PPO，且支持分布式训练并保持高性能。
AI.conclusion: 概率比值裁剪并非必要，基于早停机制的ESPO能更高效地优化策略，为PPO改进提供新方向。

title: SUGAR: Efficient Subgraph-level Training via Resource-aware Graph Partitioning
title_zh: SUGAR：通过资源感知图分区进行高效的子图级训练
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated a great potential in a variety of graph-based applications, such as recommender systems, drug discovery, and object recognition. Nevertheless, resource-efficient GNN learning is a rarely explored topic despite its many benefits for edge computing and Internet of Things (IoT) applications. To improve this state of affairs, this work proposes efficient subgraph-level training via resource-aware graph partitioning (SUGAR). SUGAR first partitions the initial graph into a set of disjoint subgraphs and then performs local training at the subgraph-level. We provide a theoretical analysis and conduct extensive experiments on five graph benchmarks to verify its efficacy in practice. Our results show that SUGAR can achieve up to 33 times runtime speedup and 3.8 times memory reduction on large-scale graphs. We believe SUGAR opens a new research direction towards developing GNN methods that are resource-efficient, hence suitable for IoT deployment.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have demonstrated a great potential in a variety of graph-based applications, such as recommender systems, drug discovery, and object recognition. Nevertheless, resource-efficient GNN learning is a rarely explored topic despite its many benefits for edge computing and Internet of Things (IoT) applications. To improve this state of affairs, this work proposes efficient subgraph-level training via resource-aware graph partitioning (SUGAR). SUGAR first partitions the initial graph into a set of disjoint subgraphs and then performs local training at the subgraph-level. We provide a theoretical analysis and conduct extensive experiments on five graph benchmarks to verify its efficacy in practice. Our results show that SUGAR can achieve up to 33 times runtime speedup and 3.8 times memory reduction on large-scale graphs. We believe SUGAR opens a new research direction towards developing GNN methods that are resource-efficient, hence suitable for IoT deployment.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络 (GNN) 在各种基于图的应用中展示了巨大的潜力，例如推荐系统、药物发现和对象识别。尽管如此，资源高效的 GNN 学习仍然是一个很少被探讨的话题，尽管它对边缘计算和物联网 (IoT) 应用有很多好处。为了改善这种状况，这项工作提出了通过资源感知图分区（SUGAR）进行有效的子图级训练。 SUGAR 首先将初始图划分为一组不相交的子图，然后在子图级别进行局部训练。我们提供了理论分析，并在五个图形基准上进行了广泛的实验，以验证其在实践中的有效性。我们的结果表明，SUGAR 在大规模图上可以实现高达 33 倍的运行加速和 3.8 倍的内存减少。我们相信 SUGAR 为开发资源高效、适合物联网部署的 GNN 方法开辟了新的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SUGAR的高效子图级训练方法，通过资源感知的图划分技术提升图神经网络（GNN）的训练效率。
AI.motivation: 尽管图神经网络（GNN）在多个领域表现出潜力，但其资源效率低下，难以满足边缘计算和物联网（IoT）应用的需求。
AI.method: SUGAR首先将初始图划分为多个不相交的子图，然后在子图级别进行本地训练，结合理论分析与实验验证其有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，SUGAR在大规模图上实现了最高33倍的运行时速提升和3.8倍的内存减少。
AI.conclusion: SUGAR为开发资源高效的GNN方法开辟了新方向，使其更适用于物联网部署。

title: "How trustworthy is this research?" Designing a Tool to Help Readers Understand Evidence and Uncertainty in Science Journalism
title_zh: “这项研究的可信度如何？”设计一个工具来帮助读者理解科学新闻中的证据和不确定性
comment: ef:Anders Sundnes Løvlie, Astrid Waagstein & Peter Hyldgård (2023) 'How Trustworthy Is This Research?' Designing a Tool to Help Readers Understand Evidence and Uncertainty in Science Journalism, Digital Journalism
comments: ef:Anders Sundnes Løvlie, Astrid Waagstein & Peter Hyldgård (2023) 'How Trustworthy Is This Research?' Designing a Tool to Help Readers Understand Evidence and Uncertainty in Science Journalism, Digital Journalism
abstract: This article reports on a Research through Design study exploring how to design a tool for helping readers of science journalism understand the strength and uncertainty of scientific evidence in news stories about health science, using both textual and visual information. A central aim has been to teach readers about criteria for assessing scientific evidence, in particular in order to help readers differentiate between science and pseudoscience. Working in a research-in-the-wild collaboration with a website for popular science, the study presents the design and evaluation of the Scientific Evidence Indicator, which uses metadata about scientific publications to present an assessment of evidence strength to the readers. Evaluations of the design demonstrate some success in helping readers recognize whether studies have undergone scientific peer review or not, but point to challenges in facilitating a more in-depth understanding. Insights from the study point to a potential for developing similar tools aimed at journalists rather than directly at audiences.
summary: This article reports on a Research through Design study exploring how to design a tool for helping readers of science journalism understand the strength and uncertainty of scientific evidence in news stories about health science, using both textual and visual information. A central aim has been to teach readers about criteria for assessing scientific evidence, in particular in order to help readers differentiate between science and pseudoscience. Working in a research-in-the-wild collaboration with a website for popular science, the study presents the design and evaluation of the Scientific Evidence Indicator, which uses metadata about scientific publications to present an assessment of evidence strength to the readers. Evaluations of the design demonstrate some success in helping readers recognize whether studies have undergone scientific peer review or not, but point to challenges in facilitating a more in-depth understanding. Insights from the study point to a potential for developing similar tools aimed at journalists rather than directly at audiences.
abstract_zh: 本文报道了一项通过设计进行研究的研究，探索如何设计一种工具，利用文本和视觉信息，帮助科学新闻读者了解健康科学新闻报道中科学证据的强度和不确定性。一个中心目标是向读者传授评估科学证据的标准，特别是为了帮助读者区分科学和伪科学。该研究与科普网站合作进行野外研究，介绍了科学证据指标的设计和评估，该指标使用有关科学出版物的元数据向读者提供证据强度的评估。对设计的评估表明，在帮助读者认识研究是否经过科学同行评审方面取得了一些成功，但也指出了促进更深入理解方面的挑战。该研究的见解表明，有可能开发针对记者而不是直接针对受众的类似工具。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种工具，旨在帮助读者理解科学新闻中的证据强度和不确定性，提升其区分科学与伪科学的能力。
AI.motivation: 科学新闻中读者常难以判断证据的可靠性，需通过工具辅助提升其科学素养和批判性思维。
AI.method: 采用设计研究方法，与科学新闻网站合作开发‘科学证据指标’工具，结合元数据和可视化信息评估证据强度。
AI.result: 工具在帮助读者识别研究是否经过同行评审方面有效，但深入理解证据强度存在挑战，且发现针对记者的工具开发潜力。
AI.conclusion: 工具设计初步成功，但需优化以促进更深入理解；未来可探索面向记者的工具以提升科学报道质量。

ai_content.tldr: 本文设计了一种工具，旨在帮助读者理解科学新闻中的证据强度和不确定性，提升其区分科学与伪科学的能力。

search_text: "How trustworthy is this research?" Designing a Tool to Help Readers Understand Evidence and Uncertainty in Science Journalism “这项研究的可信度如何？”设计一个工具来帮助读者理解科学新闻中的证据和不确定性 This article reports on a Research through Design study exploring how to design a tool for helping readers of science journalism understand the strength and uncertainty of scientific evidence in news stories about health science, using both textual and visual information. A central aim has been to teach readers about criteria for assessing scientific evidence, in particular in order to help readers differentiate between science and pseudoscience. Working in a research-in-the-wild collaboration with a website for popular science, the study presents the design and evaluation of the Scientific Evidence Indicator, which uses metadata about scientific publications to present an assessment of evidence strength to the readers. Evaluations of the design demonstrate some success in helping readers recognize whether studies have undergone scientific peer review or not, but point to challenges in facilitating a more in-depth understanding. Insights from the study point to a potential for developing similar tools aimed at journalists rather than directly at audiences. 本文报道了一项通过设计进行研究的研究，探索如何设计一种工具，利用文本和视觉信息，帮助科学新闻读者了解健康科学新闻报道中科学证据的强度和不确定性。一个中心目标是向读者传授评估科学证据的标准，特别是为了帮助读者区分科学和伪科学。该研究与科普网站合作进行野外研究，介绍了科学证据指标的设计和评估，该指标使用有关科学出版物的元数据向读者提供证据强度的评估。对设计的评估表明，在帮助读者认识研究是否经过科学同行评审方面取得了一些成功，但也指出了促进更深入理解方面的挑战。该研究的见解表明，有可能开发针对记者而不是直接针对受众的类似工具。 本文设计了一种工具，旨在帮助读者理解科学新闻中的证据强度和不确定性，提升其区分科学与伪科学的能力。 Anders Sundnes Løvlie,Astrid Waagstein,Peter Hyldgård cs.DL,cs.HC

authors_text: Conrad M Albrecht,Fernando Marianno,Levente J Klein
title: AutoGeoLabel: Automated Label Generation for Geospatial Machine Learning
title_zh: AutoGeoLabel：地理空间机器学习的自动标签生成
abstract: A key challenge of supervised learning is the availability of human-labeled data. We evaluate a big data processing pipeline to auto-generate labels for remote sensing data. It is based on rasterized statistical features extracted from surveys such as e.g. LiDAR measurements. Using simple combinations of the rasterized statistical layers, it is demonstrated that multiple classes can be generated at accuracies of ~0.9. As proof of concept, we utilize the big geo-data platform IBM PAIRS to dynamically generate such labels in dense urban areas with multiple land cover classes. The general method proposed here is platform independent, and it can be adapted to generate labels for other satellite modalities in order to enable machine learning on overhead imagery for land use classification and object detection.
summary: A key challenge of supervised learning is the availability of human-labeled data. We evaluate a big data processing pipeline to auto-generate labels for remote sensing data. It is based on rasterized statistical features extracted from surveys such as e.g. LiDAR measurements. Using simple combinations of the rasterized statistical layers, it is demonstrated that multiple classes can be generated at accuracies of ~0.9. As proof of concept, we utilize the big geo-data platform IBM PAIRS to dynamically generate such labels in dense urban areas with multiple land cover classes. The general method proposed here is platform independent, and it can be adapted to generate labels for other satellite modalities in order to enable machine learning on overhead imagery for land use classification and object detection.
abstract_zh: 监督学习的一个关键挑战是人工标记数据的可用性。我们评估大数据处理管道，以自动生成遥感数据的标签。它基于从调查中提取的栅格化统计特征，例如激光雷达测量。使用栅格化统计层的简单组合，证明可以以约 0.9 的精度生成多个类。作为概念验证，我们利用大地理数据平台 IBM PAIRS 在具有多种土地覆盖类别的密集城市地区动态生成此类标签。这里提出的通用方法是独立于平台的，并且可以适用于为其他卫星模式生成标签，以便能够对高空图像进行机器学习，以进行土地利用分类和物体检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自动化生成地理空间机器学习标签的方法AutoGeoLabel，通过栅格统计特征组合实现高精度土地覆盖分类。
AI.motivation: 监督学习依赖人工标注数据，但地理空间数据标注成本高且效率低，亟需自动化标签生成方案。
AI.method: 基于LiDAR等遥感数据的栅格统计特征，结合IBM PAIRS平台动态生成多类别标签，采用简单特征组合策略实现自动化标注。
AI.result: 在密集城区测试中达到约0.9的分类准确率，验证了方法有效性，且该框架可扩展至其他卫星数据模态。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法具有平台无关性，为遥感影像土地利用分类和目标检测提供可复用的自动化标签生成范式。

authors_text: Xuezhou Zhang,Yuda Song,Masatoshi Uehara,Mengdi Wang,Alekh Agarwal,Wen Sun
title: Efficient Reinforcement Learning in Block MDPs: A Model-free Representation Learning Approach
title_zh: 块 MDP 中的高效强化学习：一种无模型表示学习方法
abstract: We present BRIEE (Block-structured Representation learning with Interleaved Explore Exploit), an algorithm for efficient reinforcement learning in Markov Decision Processes with block-structured dynamics (i.e., Block MDPs), where rich observations are generated from a set of unknown latent states. BRIEE interleaves latent states discovery, exploration, and exploitation together, and can provably learn a near-optimal policy with sample complexity scaling polynomially in the number of latent states, actions, and the time horizon, with no dependence on the size of the potentially infinite observation space. Empirically, we show that BRIEE is more sample efficient than the state-of-art Block MDP algorithm HOMER and other empirical RL baselines on challenging rich-observation combination lock problems that require deep exploration.
summary: We present BRIEE (Block-structured Representation learning with Interleaved Explore Exploit), an algorithm for efficient reinforcement learning in Markov Decision Processes with block-structured dynamics (i.e., Block MDPs), where rich observations are generated from a set of unknown latent states. BRIEE interleaves latent states discovery, exploration, and exploitation together, and can provably learn a near-optimal policy with sample complexity scaling polynomially in the number of latent states, actions, and the time horizon, with no dependence on the size of the potentially infinite observation space. Empirically, we show that BRIEE is more sample efficient than the state-of-art Block MDP algorithm HOMER and other empirical RL baselines on challenging rich-observation combination lock problems that require deep exploration.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 BRIEE（使用 Interleaved Explore Exploit 的块结构表示学习），这是一种在具有块结构动态（即块 MDP）的马尔可夫决策过程中进行高效强化学习的算法，其中从一组未知的潜在状态生成丰富的观察结果。 BRIEE 将潜在状态发现、探索和利用交织在一起，并且可以证明学习近乎最优的策略，其样本复杂性在潜在状态、动作和时间范围的数量上按多项式缩放，而不依赖于潜在无限观察空间的大小。根据经验，我们表明，在挑战需要深度探索的丰富观察组合锁问题时，BRIEE 比最先进的 Block MDP 算法 HOMER 和其他经验 RL 基线更具样本效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BRIEE算法，用于在块结构马尔可夫决策过程（Block MDPs）中实现高效强化学习，通过无模型表示学习解决高维观测下的样本效率问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在处理高维观测时面临样本效率低的问题，而块MDP的潜在状态结构未被有效利用，需设计无模型方法以实现高效学习。
AI.method: BRIEE算法通过交织潜在状态发现、探索与利用，结合无模型表示学习，样本复杂度仅依赖潜在状态数、动作数和时间范围，与观测空间大小无关。
AI.result: 实验表明，BRIEE在需深度探索的组合锁问题上优于HOMER等现有算法，样本效率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: BRIEE有效解决了块MDP的高效学习问题，为无模型表示学习提供了新思路，未来可扩展至其他结构化环境。

title: Accurate Link Lifetime Computation in Autonomous Airborne UAV Networks
title_zh: 自主机载无人机网络中准确的链路寿命计算
comment: Mathematical framework to accurately compute link lifetime in an airborne network
comments: Mathematical framework to accurately compute link lifetime in an airborne network
abstract: An autonomous airborne network (AN) consists of multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), which can self-configure to provide seamless, low-cost and secure connectivity. AN is preferred for applications in civilian and military sectors because it can improve the network reliability and fault tolerance, reduce mission completion time through collaboration, and adapt to dynamic mission requirements. However, facilitating seamless communication in such ANs is a challenging task due to their fast node mobility, which results in frequent link disruptions. Many existing AN-specific mobility-aware schemes restrictively assume that UAVs fly in straight lines, to reduce the high uncertainty in the mobility pattern and simplify the calculation of link lifetime (LLT). Here, LLT represents the duration after which the link between a node pair terminates. However, the application of such schemes is severely limited, which makes them unsuitable for practical autonomous ANs. In this report, a mathematical framework is described to accurately compute the \textit{LLT} value for a UAV node pair, where each node flies independently in a randomly selected smooth trajectory. In addition, the impact of random trajectory changes on LLT accuracy is also discussed.
summary: An autonomous airborne network (AN) consists of multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), which can self-configure to provide seamless, low-cost and secure connectivity. AN is preferred for applications in civilian and military sectors because it can improve the network reliability and fault tolerance, reduce mission completion time through collaboration, and adapt to dynamic mission requirements. However, facilitating seamless communication in such ANs is a challenging task due to their fast node mobility, which results in frequent link disruptions. Many existing AN-specific mobility-aware schemes restrictively assume that UAVs fly in straight lines, to reduce the high uncertainty in the mobility pattern and simplify the calculation of link lifetime (LLT). Here, LLT represents the duration after which the link between a node pair terminates. However, the application of such schemes is severely limited, which makes them unsuitable for practical autonomous ANs. In this report, a mathematical framework is described to accurately compute the \textit{LLT} value for a UAV node pair, where each node flies independently in a randomly selected smooth trajectory. In addition, the impact of random trajectory changes on LLT accuracy is also discussed.
abstract_zh: 自主机载网络 (AN) 由多架无人机 (UAV) 组成，可以进行自我配置以提供无缝、低成本和安全的连接。 AN是民用和军事领域应用的首选，因为它可以提高网络可靠性和容错能力，通过协作减少任务完成时间，并适应动态任务需求。然而，由于节点移动速度快，导致频繁的链路中断，因此促进此类 AN 中的无缝通信是一项具有挑战性的任务。许多现有的特定于AN的移动感知方案限制性地假设无人机沿直线飞行，以减少移动模式的高度不确定性并简化链路寿命（LLT）的计算。这里，LLT 表示节点对之间的链路终止之前的持续时间。然而，此类方案的应用受到严重限制，这使得它们不适合实际的自主AN。在本报告中，描述了一个数学框架来准确计算无人机节点对的 \textit{LLT} 值，其中每个节点在随机选择的平滑轨迹中独立飞行。此外，还讨论了随机轨迹变化对LLT精度的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数学框架，用于准确计算自主空中无人机网络中节点对的链路生存时间（LLT），无需假设无人机沿直线飞行。
AI.motivation: 现有方案因假设无人机沿直线飞行而限制了实际应用，无法适应动态任务需求，需更精确的LLT计算方法以提升网络可靠性。
AI.method: 构建数学框架，考虑无人机独立随机平滑轨迹，分析轨迹变化对LLT精度的影响。
AI.result: 实现了无需直线飞行假设的LLT准确计算，提升了自主空中网络的通信稳定性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过精确LLT计算，增强了自主空中网络在动态环境中的可靠性和任务完成效率。

search_text: Accurate Link Lifetime Computation in Autonomous Airborne UAV Networks 自主机载无人机网络中准确的链路寿命计算 An autonomous airborne network (AN) consists of multiple unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), which can self-configure to provide seamless, low-cost and secure connectivity. AN is preferred for applications in civilian and military sectors because it can improve the network reliability and fault tolerance, reduce mission completion time through collaboration, and adapt to dynamic mission requirements. However, facilitating seamless communication in such ANs is a challenging task due to their fast node mobility, which results in frequent link disruptions. Many existing AN-specific mobility-aware schemes restrictively assume that UAVs fly in straight lines, to reduce the high uncertainty in the mobility pattern and simplify the calculation of link lifetime (LLT). Here, LLT represents the duration after which the link between a node pair terminates. However, the application of such schemes is severely limited, which makes them unsuitable for practical autonomous ANs. In this report, a mathematical framework is described to accurately compute the \textit{LLT} value for a UAV node pair, where each node flies independently in a randomly selected smooth trajectory. In addition, the impact of random trajectory changes on LLT accuracy is also discussed. 自主机载网络 (AN) 由多架无人机 (UAV) 组成，可以进行自我配置以提供无缝、低成本和安全的连接。 AN是民用和军事领域应用的首选，因为它可以提高网络可靠性和容错能力，通过协作减少任务完成时间，并适应动态任务需求。然而，由于节点移动速度快，导致频繁的链路中断，因此促进此类 AN 中的无缝通信是一项具有挑战性的任务。许多现有的特定于AN的移动感知方案限制性地假设无人机沿直线飞行，以减少移动模式的高度不确定性并简化链路寿命（LLT）的计算。这里，LLT 表示节点对之间的链路终止之前的持续时间。然而，此类方案的应用受到严重限制，这使得它们不适合实际的自主AN。在本报告中，描述了一个数学框架来准确计算无人机节点对的 \textit{LLT} 值，其中每个节点在随机选择的平滑轨迹中独立飞行。此外，还讨论了随机轨迹变化对LLT精度的影响。 本文提出了一种数学框架，用于准确计算自主空中无人机网络中节点对的链路生存时间（LLT），无需假设无人机沿直线飞行。 Shivam Garg,Alexander Ihler,Sunil Kumar cs.NI,cs.RO

title: Quantum machine learning with subspace states
title_zh: 具有子空间状态的量子机器学习
abstract: We introduce a new approach for quantum linear algebra based on quantum subspace states and present three new quantum machine learning algorithms. The first is a quantum determinant sampling algorithm that samples from the distribution $\Pr[S]= det(X_{S}X_{S}^{T})$ for $|S|=d$ using $O(nd)$ gates and with circuit depth $O(d\log n)$. The state of art classical algorithm for the task requires $O(d^{3})$ operations \cite{derezinski2019minimax}. The second is a quantum singular value estimation algorithm for compound matrices $\mathcal{A}^{k}$, the speedup for this algorithm is potentially exponential. It decomposes a $\binom{n}{k}$ dimensional vector of order-$k$ correlations into a linear combination of subspace states corresponding to $k$-tuples of singular vectors of $A$. The third algorithm reduces exponentially the depth of circuits used in quantum topological data analysis from $O(n)$ to $O(\log n)$. Our basic tool are quantum subspace states, defined as $|Col(X)\rangle = \sum_{S\subset [n], |S|=d} det(X_{S}) |S\rangle$ for matrices $X \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$ such that $X^{T} X = I_{d}$, that encode $d$-dimensional subspaces of $\mathbb{R}^{n}$. We develop two efficient state preparation techniques, the first using Givens circuits uses the representation of a subspace as a sequence of Givens rotations, while the second uses efficient implementations of unitaries $Γ(x) = \sum_{i} x_{i} Z^{\otimes (i-1)} \otimes X \otimes I^{n-i}$ with $O(\log n)$ depth circuits that we term Clifford loaders.
summary: We introduce a new approach for quantum linear algebra based on quantum subspace states and present three new quantum machine learning algorithms. The first is a quantum determinant sampling algorithm that samples from the distribution $\Pr[S]= det(X_{S}X_{S}^{T})$ for $|S|=d$ using $O(nd)$ gates and with circuit depth $O(d\log n)$. The state of art classical algorithm for the task requires $O(d^{3})$ operations \cite{derezinski2019minimax}. The second is a quantum singular value estimation algorithm for compound matrices $\mathcal{A}^{k}$, the speedup for this algorithm is potentially exponential. It decomposes a $\binom{n}{k}$ dimensional vector of order-$k$ correlations into a linear combination of subspace states corresponding to $k$-tuples of singular vectors of $A$. The third algorithm reduces exponentially the depth of circuits used in quantum topological data analysis from $O(n)$ to $O(\log n)$. Our basic tool are quantum subspace states, defined as $|Col(X)\rangle = \sum_{S\subset [n], |S|=d} det(X_{S}) |S\rangle$ for matrices $X \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$ such that $X^{T} X = I_{d}$, that encode $d$-dimensional subspaces of $\mathbb{R}^{n}$. We develop two efficient state preparation techniques, the first using Givens circuits uses the representation of a subspace as a sequence of Givens rotations, while the second uses efficient implementations of unitaries $Γ(x) = \sum_{i} x_{i} Z^{\otimes (i-1)} \otimes X \otimes I^{n-i}$ with $O(\log n)$ depth circuits that we term Clifford loaders.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种基于量子子空间态的量子线性代数的新方法，并提出了三种新的量子机器学习算法。第一个是量子行列式采样算法，使用 $O(nd)$ 门和电路深度 $O(d\log n)$ 从分布 $\Pr[S]= det(X_{S}X_{S}^{T})$ 进行采样，其中 $|S|=d$。该任务的最先进的经典算法需要 $O(d^{3})$ 操作 \cite{derezinski2019minimax}。第二个是复合矩阵 $\mathcal{A}^{k}$ 的量子奇异值估计算法，该算法的加速可能是指数级的。它将 $k$ 阶相关性的 $\binom{n}{k}$ 维向量分解为与 $A$ 奇异向量的 $k$ 元组相对应的子空间状态的线性组合。第三种算法以指数方式将量子拓扑数据分析中使用的电路深度从 $O(n)$ 减少到 $O(\log n)$。我们的基本工具是量子子空间状态，定义为 $|Col(X)\rangle = \sum_{S\subset [n], |S|=d} det(X_{S}) |S\rangle$ 对于矩阵 $X \in \mathbb{R}^{n \times d}$ 使得 $X^{T} X = I_{d}$，编码 $d$ 维子空间$\mathbb{R}^{n}$。我们开发了两种有效的状态准备技术，第一种使用吉文斯电路将子空间表示为一系列吉文斯旋转，而第二种使用酉$ Γ(x) = \sum_{i} x_{i} Z^{\otimes (i-1)} \otimes X \otimes I^{n-i}$和$O(\log n)$深度电路的有效实现，我们称之为Clifford加载器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于量子子空间态的新型量子线性代数方法，并设计了三种量子机器学习算法，分别用于行列式采样、复合矩阵奇异值估计及拓扑数据分析电路深度优化。
AI.motivation: 现有经典算法在处理高维数据和复杂矩阵运算时效率低下，需开发更高效的量子计算方法以突破经典计算限制。
AI.method: 通过定义量子子空间态|Col(X)⟩，结合Givens旋转电路和Clifford加载器实现高效状态制备，提出行列式采样、复合矩阵奇异值估计及拓扑数据分析优化算法。
AI.result: 行列式采样算法复杂度降至O(nd)且电路深度为O(dlogn)，奇异值估计算法具备指数级加速潜力，拓扑数据分析电路深度从O(n)降至O(logn)。
AI.conclusion: 量子子空间态为量子机器学习提供了新工具，所提算法在多个任务中显著优于经典方法，推动了量子计算在数据科学中的应用。

title: Deep-Disaster: Unsupervised Disaster Detection and Localization Using Visual Data
title_zh: 深度灾难：使用视觉数据进行无监督灾难检测和定位
abstract: Social media plays a significant role in sharing essential information, which helps humanitarian organizations in rescue operations during and after disaster incidents. However, developing an efficient method that can provide rapid analysis of social media images in the early hours of disasters is still largely an open problem, mainly due to the lack of suitable datasets and the sheer complexity of this task. In addition, supervised methods can not generalize well to novel disaster incidents. In this paper, inspired by the success of Knowledge Distillation (KD) methods, we propose an unsupervised deep neural network to detect and localize damages in social media images. Our proposed KD architecture is a feature-based distillation approach that comprises a pre-trained teacher and a smaller student network, with both networks having similar GAN architecture containing a generator and a discriminator. The student network is trained to emulate the behavior of the teacher on training input samples, which, in turn, contain images that do not include any damaged regions. Therefore, the student network only learns the distribution of no damage data and would have different behavior from the teacher network-facing damages. To detect damage, we utilize the difference between features generated by two networks using a defined score function that demonstrates the probability of damages occurring. Our experimental results on the benchmark dataset confirm that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in detecting and localizing the damaged areas, especially for novel disaster types.
summary: Social media plays a significant role in sharing essential information, which helps humanitarian organizations in rescue operations during and after disaster incidents. However, developing an efficient method that can provide rapid analysis of social media images in the early hours of disasters is still largely an open problem, mainly due to the lack of suitable datasets and the sheer complexity of this task. In addition, supervised methods can not generalize well to novel disaster incidents. In this paper, inspired by the success of Knowledge Distillation (KD) methods, we propose an unsupervised deep neural network to detect and localize damages in social media images. Our proposed KD architecture is a feature-based distillation approach that comprises a pre-trained teacher and a smaller student network, with both networks having similar GAN architecture containing a generator and a discriminator. The student network is trained to emulate the behavior of the teacher on training input samples, which, in turn, contain images that do not include any damaged regions. Therefore, the student network only learns the distribution of no damage data and would have different behavior from the teacher network-facing damages. To detect damage, we utilize the difference between features generated by two networks using a defined score function that demonstrates the probability of damages occurring. Our experimental results on the benchmark dataset confirm that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in detecting and localizing the damaged areas, especially for novel disaster types.
abstract_zh: 社交媒体在分享重要信息方面发挥着重要作用，有助于人道主义组织在灾害事件期间和之后开展救援行动。然而，开发一种能够在灾难发生初期对社交媒体图像进行快速分析的有效方法在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，这主要是由于缺乏合适的数据集以及这项任务的复杂性。此外，监督方法不能很好地推广到新的灾难事件。在本文中，受知识蒸馏（KD）方法成功的启发，我们提出了一种无监督深度神经网络来检测和定位社交媒体图像中的损坏。我们提出的 KD 架构是一种基于特征的蒸馏方法，由预先训练的教师网络和较小的学生网络组成，两个网络都具有类似的 GAN 架构，其中包含生成器和鉴别器。学生网络经过训练，可以模拟教师在训练输入样本上的行为，而训练输入样本又包含不包含任何损坏区域的图像。因此，学生网络仅学习无损坏数据的分布，并且与教师网络面对损坏时会有不同的行为。为了检测损坏，我们利用两个网络生成的特征之间的差异，使用定义的评分函数来演示损坏发生的概率。我们在基准数据集上的实验结果证实，我们的方法在检测和定位受损区域方面优于最先进的方法，特别是对于新的灾害类型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督深度神经网络方法，用于检测和定位社交媒体图像中的灾害损害区域。
AI.motivation: 现有监督方法难以泛化到新型灾害，且缺乏标注数据集，需开发无需标注数据的高效灾害分析方法以支持救援行动。
AI.method: 基于知识蒸馏框架设计师生网络结构，教师网络与学生网络均采用类似GAN的生成器-判别器架构，通过无损图像训练学生网络，利用两网络特征差异构建损伤概率评分函数进行检测。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在检测和定位受损区域方面优于现有最先进方法，尤其对新型灾害类型效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出的无监督方法有效解决了灾害检测中的数据不足和泛化问题，为社交媒体图像的灾害分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Deep-Disaster: Unsupervised Disaster Detection and Localization Using Visual Data 深度灾难：使用视觉数据进行无监督灾难检测和定位 Social media plays a significant role in sharing essential information, which helps humanitarian organizations in rescue operations during and after disaster incidents. However, developing an efficient method that can provide rapid analysis of social media images in the early hours of disasters is still largely an open problem, mainly due to the lack of suitable datasets and the sheer complexity of this task. In addition, supervised methods can not generalize well to novel disaster incidents. In this paper, inspired by the success of Knowledge Distillation (KD) methods, we propose an unsupervised deep neural network to detect and localize damages in social media images. Our proposed KD architecture is a feature-based distillation approach that comprises a pre-trained teacher and a smaller student network, with both networks having similar GAN architecture containing a generator and a discriminator. The student network is trained to emulate the behavior of the teacher on training input samples, which, in turn, contain images that do not include any damaged regions. Therefore, the student network only learns the distribution of no damage data and would have different behavior from the teacher network-facing damages. To detect damage, we utilize the difference between features generated by two networks using a defined score function that demonstrates the probability of damages occurring. Our experimental results on the benchmark dataset confirm that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in detecting and localizing the damaged areas, especially for novel disaster types. 社交媒体在分享重要信息方面发挥着重要作用，有助于人道主义组织在灾害事件期间和之后开展救援行动。然而，开发一种能够在灾难发生初期对社交媒体图像进行快速分析的有效方法在很大程度上仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，这主要是由于缺乏合适的数据集以及这项任务的复杂性。此外，监督方法不能很好地推广到新的灾难事件。在本文中，受知识蒸馏（KD）方法成功的启发，我们提出了一种无监督深度神经网络来检测和定位社交媒体图像中的损坏。我们提出的 KD 架构是一种基于特征的蒸馏方法，由预先训练的教师网络和较小的学生网络组成，两个网络都具有类似的 GAN 架构，其中包含生成器和鉴别器。学生网络经过训练，可以模拟教师在训练输入样本上的行为，而训练输入样本又包含不包含任何损坏区域的图像。因此，学生网络仅学习无损坏数据的分布，并且与教师网络面对损坏时会有不同的行为。为了检测损坏，我们利用两个网络生成的特征之间的差异，使用定义的评分函数来演示损坏发生的概率。我们在基准数据集上的实验结果证实，我们的方法在检测和定位受损区域方面优于最先进的方法，特别是对于新的灾害类型。 本文提出一种无监督深度神经网络方法，用于检测和定位社交媒体图像中的灾害损害区域。 Soroor Shekarizadeh,Razieh Rastgoo,Saif Al-Kuwari,Mohammad Sabokrou cs.CV

title: The Stories We Tell About Data: Media Types for Data-Driven Storytelling
title_zh: 我们讲述的关于数据的故事：数据驱动叙事的媒体类型
abstract: The emerging practice of data-driven storytelling is framing data using familiar narrative mechanisms such as slideshows, videos, and comics to make even highly complex phenomena understandable. However, current data stories are still not utilizing the full potential of the storytelling domain. One reason for this is that current data-driven storytelling practice does not leverage the full repertoire of media that can be used for storytelling, such as the spoken word, e-learning, and video games. In this paper, we propose a taxonomy focused specifically on media types for the purpose of widening the purview of data-driven storytelling simply by putting more tools into the hands of designers. Using our taxonomy as a generative tool, we also propose three novel storytelling mechanisms, including for live-streaming, gesture-driven oral presentations, and textual reports that dynamically incorporate visual representations.
summary: The emerging practice of data-driven storytelling is framing data using familiar narrative mechanisms such as slideshows, videos, and comics to make even highly complex phenomena understandable. However, current data stories are still not utilizing the full potential of the storytelling domain. One reason for this is that current data-driven storytelling practice does not leverage the full repertoire of media that can be used for storytelling, such as the spoken word, e-learning, and video games. In this paper, we propose a taxonomy focused specifically on media types for the purpose of widening the purview of data-driven storytelling simply by putting more tools into the hands of designers. Using our taxonomy as a generative tool, we also propose three novel storytelling mechanisms, including for live-streaming, gesture-driven oral presentations, and textual reports that dynamically incorporate visual representations.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动讲故事的新兴实践是使用幻灯片、视频和漫画等熟悉的叙事机制来构建数据，使高度复杂的现象变得易于理解。然而，当前的数据故事仍未充分利用讲故事领域的全部潜力。原因之一是当前数据驱动的讲故事实践没有充分利用可用于讲故事的全部媒体，例如口语、电子学习和视频游戏。在本文中，我们提出了一种专门针对媒体类型的分类法，目的是通过向设计师提供更多工具来扩大数据驱动的故事讲述的范围。使用我们的分类法作为生成工具，我们还提出了三种新颖的讲故事机制，包括直播、手势驱动的口头演示以及动态结合视觉表示的文本报告。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对数据驱动叙事的媒体类型分类法，旨在通过扩展可用工具来拓宽数据叙事的范围。
AI.motivation: 当前数据叙事未充分利用如口语、电子学习和电子游戏等多样化叙事媒介，限制了其表现力和应用场景。
AI.method: 构建聚焦媒体类型的分类体系，并基于该体系设计三种新型叙事机制：直播、手势驱动的口头演示及动态融合视觉元素的文本报告。
AI.result: 提出了三种创新叙事形式，验证了扩展媒介类型对提升数据叙事效果的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入多样化媒介类型，数据叙事可获得更丰富的表达方式，为设计师提供全新创作工具。
